title: Head of AI Platform Engineering
description: <div class="content-intro"><h2><strong>Who Are We?</strong></h2> <p>Postman is the world’s leading API platform, used by more than 45 million+ developers and 500,000 organizations, including 98% of the Fortune 500. Postman is helping developers and professionals across the globe build the API-first world by simplifying each step of the API lifecycle and streamlining collaboration—enabling users to create better APIs, faster.</p> <p>The company is headquartered in San Francisco and has offices in Boston, New York, Austin, Tokyo, London, and Bangalore - where Postman was founded. Postman is privately held, with funding from Battery Ventures, BOND, Coatue, CRV, Insight Partners, and Nexus Venture Partners. Learn more at postman.com or connect with Postman on X via @getpostman.</p> <p>P.S: We highly recommend reading <a href="https://api-first-world.com/">The "API-First World" graphic novel</a> to understand the bigger picture and our vision at Postman.</p></div><h2><strong>The Opportunity</strong></h2> <p>As the Head of AI Platform Engineering at Postman, you will lead the alignment of AI development with our growing API platform. You will drive the AI roadmap with a focus on expanding AI-driven API collaboration and agentic capabilities across the platform. This role requires a leader who can identify market opportunities, coordinate cross-functional AI initiatives, and foster strong partnerships to amplify the Postman AI platform's impact</p> <h2><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></h2> <ul class="ak-ul" data-indent-level="1"> <li>Lead the development and execution of Postman’s AI platform strategy, focused on API ecosystem growth and platform innovation.</li> <li>Drive the AI roadmap, concentrating on API integration, platform expansion, and AI-driven agent functionality.</li> <li>Identify and capitalize on market opportunities for AI-enhanced API collaboration and intelligent agent features.</li> <li>Collaborate closely with business units, product teams, engineering, and external partners to ensure alignment and successful AI initiatives deployment.</li> <li>Oversee implementation with core AI platforms (OpenAI, Anthropic, AWS, etc)), ensuring technical and strategic alignment with AI features and API lifecycle improvements.</li> <li>Mentor and inspire internal teams and external collaborators to embrace AI innovation in API contexts.</li> <li>Evaluate emerging AI technologies and tools to continuously enhance platform capabilities.</li> </ul> <h2><strong>About You</strong></h2> <ul class="ak-ul" data-indent-level="1"> <li>Proven leadership experience managing AI or platform teams, preferably in API-centric or developer platform companies.</li> <li>Strong technical background in AI, machine learning, and API platforms with hands-on experience in developing or integrating AI-driven APIs or agents.</li> <li>Deep understanding of API ecosystems, platform strategy, and partner dynamics</li> <li>Demonstrated ability to lead cross-functional teams and coordinate complex projects involving product, engineering, partnerships, and marketing.</li> <li>Excellent communication skills with experience presenting to both technical and non-technical audiences.</li> <li>Passion for AI safety, ethical AI development, and building scalable, user-centric platforms.</li> </ul> <p><strong data-renderer-mark="true">Preferred</strong>:</p> <ul class="ak-ul" data-indent-level="1"> <li>Experience working in or with API developer tools, SaaS ecosystems, or AI agent platforms.</li> <li>Background in product strategy or technical partner management related to AI and cloud platforms.</li> <li>Strong network in AI and API partner communities.</li> </ul> <p>The reasonably estimated base salary for this role ranges from $310,000.00 to $400,000.00, plus a competitive equity package. Actual compensation is based on the candidate's skills, qualifications, and experience.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><h2 data-renderer-start-pos="4036"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">What Else?</strong></h2> <p data-renderer-start-pos="4048">In addition to Postman's pay-on-performance philosophy, and a flexible schedule working with a fun, collaborative team, Postman offers a comprehensive set of benefits, including full medical coverage, flexible PTO, wellness reimbursement, and a monthly lunch stipend. Along with that, our wellness programs will help you stay in the best of your physical and mental health. Our frequent and fascinating team-building events will keep you connected, while our donation-matching program can support the causes you care about. We’re building a long-term company with an inclusive culture where everyone can be the best version of themselves.&nbsp;</p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="4048">At Postman we value in person collaboration. We are in office 5 days a week for all roles based out of our hubs in San Francisco Bay Area, Boston, Austin, Tokyo and London. For roles based in Bangalore, employees currently work in the office three days a week and will transition to five days per week by the end of the year. We were thoughtful in our approach which is based on collaboration and grounded in feedback from our workforce, leadership team, and peers. The benefits of our in office model will be shared knowledge, brainstorming sessions, communication, and building trust in-person that cannot be replicated via zoom.</p> <h2 data-renderer-start-pos="3620"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">Our Values</strong></h2> <p data-renderer-start-pos="3633">At Postman, we create with the same curiosity that we see in our users. We value transparency and honest communication about not only successes, but also failures. In our work, we focus on specific goals that add up to a larger vision. Our inclusive work culture ensures that everyone is valued equally as important pieces of our final product. We are dedicated to delivering the best products we can.</p> <h2><strong>Equal opportunity</strong></h2> <p data-renderer-start-pos="4048">Postman is an Equal Employment Opportunity and Affirmative Action Employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender perception or identity, national origin, age, marital status, protected veteran status, or disability status. Headhunters and recruitment agencies may not submit resumes/CVs through this website or directly to managers. Postman does not accept unsolicited headhunter and agency resumes. Postman will not pay fees to any third-party agency or company that does not have a signed agreement with Postman.</p></div>

continuous improvement in deployment practices, monitoring approaches, and incident management processes</p> </li> </ul> <h2><strong>About You</strong></h2> <ul class="ak-ul" data-indent-level="1"> unique challenges of maintaining large-scale AI systems and integrating AI-specific metrics into reliability frameworks</p> </li> <li> <p data-renderer-start-pos="12019">Are experienced with cloud title: Senior Backend Engineer, Cloud Platform
description: <div class="content-intro"><h2><strong>Who Are We?</strong></h2> <p>Postman is the world’s leading API platform, used by more than 45 million+ developers and 500,000 organizations, including 98% of the Fortune 500. Postman is helping developers and professionals across the globe build the API-first world by simplifying each step of the API lifecycle and streamlining collaboration—enabling users to create better APIs, faster.</p> <p>The company is headquartered in San Francisco and has offices in Boston, New York, Austin, Tokyo, London, and Bangalore - where Postman was founded. Postman is privately held, with funding from Battery Ventures, BOND, Coatue, CRV, Insight Partners, and Nexus Venture Partners. Learn more at postman.com or connect with Postman on X via @getpostman.</p> <p>P.S: We highly recommend reading <a href="https://api-first-world.com/">The "API-First World" graphic novel</a> to understand the bigger picture and our vision at Postman.</p></div><h2><strong>The Opportunity</strong></h2> <p>As a&nbsp;Senior Backend Engineer&nbsp;on the&nbsp;Cloud Platform team, you will play a key role in building the core systems and services that power Postman’s internal platform. You’ll help create new backend services that manage how we deploy, scale, and operate our infrastructure and product services, leveraging&nbsp;Java, Spring Boot, and Hibernate (JPA)&nbsp;on top of&nbsp;cloud-native technologies like Kubernetes, ArgoCD, Istio, and Terraform.</p> <p>This role is highly impactful: the systems you build will be used across Postman engineering, enabling faster delivery, better scalability, and a stronger developer experience. You’ll also have the opportunity to contribute to open source, shaping tools that extend beyond Postman’s boundaries.</p> <h2>What You’ll Do</h2> <ul> <li>Design and develop backend services in Java and Spring Boot to support Postman’s internal Cloud Platform.<br><br></li> <li>Architect new services that manage service deployment, lifecycle, and scaling across Kubernetes clusters.<br><br></li> <li>Implement GitOps workflows (ArgoCD) to support continuous delivery.<br><br></li> <li>Integrate with cloud-native tooling such as Istio, Helm, and Terraform.<br><br></li> <li>Apply strong software engineering practices: testing, code reviews, CI/CD, and documentation.<br><br></li> <li>Drive innovation by contributing to open-source projects where applicable.<br><br></li> <li>Collaborate cross-functionally with Cloud Architects, DevOps engineers, and product teams to align solutions with business needs.<br><br></li> <li>Ensure performance, reliability, and scalability of services that run at Postman’s scale.</li> </ul> <h2>About You</h2> <ul> <li>5+ years of professional experience in backend software development.</li> <li> <p>Strong expertise in Java, Spring Boot, and Hibernate (JPA).</p> </li> <li> <p>Proven experience designing and maintaining APIs and distributed backend services.</p> </li> <li> <p>Familiarity with Kubernetes, Argo, Istio, and Terraform.</p> </li> <li> <p>Strong understanding of software design principles (scalability, extensibility, resilience).</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with build and testing tools (Gradle, Maven, JUnit).</p> </li> <li> <p>Proficiency with Git and Gitflow workflows.</p> </li> <li> <p>Excellent collaboration and communication skills.</p> </li> <li>Strong security mindset and awareness of compliance frameworks.</li> </ul> <p>The reasonably estimated base salary for this role ranges from $210,000 to $240,000, plus a competitive equity package. Actual compensation is based on the candidate's skills, qualifications, and experience.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><h2 data-renderer-start-pos="4036"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">What Else?</strong></h2> <p data-renderer-start-pos="4048">In addition to Postman's pay-on-performance philosophy, and a flexible schedule working with a fun, collaborative team, Postman offers a comprehensive set of benefits, including full medical coverage, flexible PTO, wellness reimbursement, and a monthly lunch stipend. Along with that, our wellness programs will help you stay in the best of your physical and mental health. Our frequent and fascinating team-building events will keep you connected, while our donation-matching program can support the causes you care about. We’re building a long-term company with an inclusive culture where everyone can be the best version of themselves.&nbsp;</p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="4048">At Postman we value in person collaboration. We are in office 5 days a week for all roles based out of our hubs in San Francisco Bay Area, Boston, Austin, Tokyo and London. For roles based in Bangalore, employees currently work in the office three days a week and will transition to five days per week by the end of the year. We were thoughtful in our approach which is based on collaboration and grounded in feedback from our workforce, leadership team, and peers. The benefits of our in office model will be shared knowledge, brainstorming sessions, communication, and building trust in-person that cannot be replicated via zoom.</p> <h2 data-renderer-start-pos="3620"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">Our Values</strong></h2> <p data-renderer-start-pos="3633">At Postman, we create with the same curiosity that we see in our users. We value transparency and honest communication about not only successes, but also failures. In our work, we focus on specific goals that add up to a larger vision. Our inclusive work culture ensures that everyone is valued equally as important pieces of our final product. We are dedicated to delivering the best products we can.</p> <h2><strong>Equal opportunity</strong></h2> <p data-renderer-start-pos="4048">Postman is an Equal Employment Opportunity and Affirmative Action Employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender perception or identity, national origin, age, marital status, protected veteran status, or disability status. Headhunters and recruitment agencies may not submit resumes/CVs through this website or directly to managers. Postman does not accept unsolicited headhunter and agency resumes. Postman will not pay fees to any third-party agency or company that does not have a signed agreement with Postman.</p></div>

description: <div class="content-intro"><h2><strong>Who Are We?</strong></h2> <p>Postman is the world’s leading API platform, used by more than 45 million+ developers and 500,000 organizations, including 98% of the Fortune 500. Postman is helping developers and professionals across the globe build the API-first world by simplifying each step of the API lifecycle and streamlining collaboration—enabling users to create better APIs, faster.</p> <p>The company is headquartered in San Francisco and has offices in Boston, New York, Austin, Tokyo, London, and Bangalore - where Postman was founded. Learn more at postman.com or connect with Postman on X via @getpostman.</p> <p>P.S: We highly recommend reading <a href="https://api-first-world.com/">The "API-First World" graphic novel</a> to understand the bigger picture and our vision at Postman.</p></div><h2><strong>The Opportunity&nbsp;</strong></h2> <p>The Customer Journey team at Postman is responsible for shaping how users experience the product from their first interaction through to becoming active, engaged customers.&nbsp;</p> <p>We own the critical paths between sign-up and purchase including new user onboarding and the moments where users discover and adopt key features. As Postman expands what it means to be a customer, from enterprise organizations to teams of engineers to individual developers working with AI agents, this team plays a central role in defining and evolving those experiences.&nbsp;</p> <p>We’re looking for a Senior Engineer who is excited to build and improve product journeys end-to-end. You’ll work at the intersection of product, design, and engineering to create intuitive, high-quality experiences that help users find value in Postman—whether they’re exploring on their own or collaborating as part of a team.</p> <h2><strong>What You’ll Do&nbsp;</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Own and improve key product journeys from sign-up through onboarding, feature discovery, and purchase&nbsp;</li> <li>Build and refine user experiences that help developers and teams quickly understand and realize the value of Postman&nbsp;</li> <li>Design and implement features that drive adoption of core platform capabilities across different user types (individuals, teams, and AI-assisted workflows)&nbsp;</li> <li>Partner closely with Product, Design, and Data to identify opportunities and prioritize improvements across the user journey&nbsp;</li> <li>Use experimentation and analytics to inform decisions and validate the impact of changes&nbsp;</li> <li>Develop a deep understanding of how developers use Postman—individually and collaboratively—and apply those insights to improve the product&nbsp;</li> <li>Iterate quickly, delivering thoughtful, incremental improvements that compound over time</li> <li>Contribute to the evolution of our onboarding and discovery systems as the product and customer base continue to grow&nbsp;</li> </ul> <h2><strong>About You&nbsp;</strong></h2> <p><strong>Must have:</strong>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>8+ years of experience building frontend or full-stack applications with a focus on product and user experience&nbsp;</li> <li>Strong fundamentals in JavaScript, HTML, and CSS; experience with modern frameworks like React or Next.js</li> <li>Track record of building and improving product experiences that drive user engagement and adoption&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience using data, analytics, or experimentation to guide product decisions</li> <li>Strong product sense and attention to detail—you care deeply about how things work and feel&nbsp;</li> <li>Ability to take ownership of ambiguous problem spaces and drive them to clear outcomes&nbsp;</li> <li>Excellent communication skills and experience collaborating across functions</li> <li>Curiosity about how developers work, and a desire to build tools that make them more effective&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong>Nice-to-have:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience with full-stack JavaScript / TypeScript&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience with state management tools like MobX&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience working on B2B products, developer tools, or AI-powered experiences</li> <li>Experience working in a fast-paced, startup environment&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p>This role is based in the greater San Francisco area, and the reasonably estimated salary for this role ranges from $210,000 to $240,000 plus a competitive equity package. Actual compensation is based on the candidate's skills, qualifications, and experience.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><h2 data-renderer-start-pos="4036"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">What Else?</strong></h2> <p data-renderer-start-pos="4048">In addition to Postman's pay-on-performance philosophy, and a flexible schedule working with a fun, collaborative team, Postman offers a comprehensive set of benefits, including full medical coverage, flexible PTO, wellness reimbursement, and a monthly lunch stipend. We were thoughtful in our approach which is based on collaboration and grounded in feedback from our workforce, leadership team, and peers. The benefits of our in office model will be shared knowledge, brainstorming sessions, communication, and building trust in-person that cannot be replicated via zoom.</p> <h2 data-renderer-start-pos="3620"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">Our Values</strong></h2> <p data-renderer-start-pos="3633">At Postman, we create with the same curiosity that we see in our users. title: Senior Software Engineer, Postman Insights
description: <div class="content-intro"><h2><strong>Who Are We?</strong></h2> <p>Postman is the world’s leading API platform, used by more than 45 million+ developers and 500,000 organizations, including 98% of the Fortune 500. Postman is helping developers and professionals across the globe build the API-first world by simplifying each step of the API lifecycle and streamlining collaboration—enabling users to create better APIs, faster.</p> <p>The company is headquartered in San Francisco and has offices in Boston, New York, Austin, Tokyo, London, and Bangalore - where Postman was founded. Our vision is to provide productive dashboards within 15 minutes of a developer signing up for an account. With our first product, we aim to provide the fastest, easiest way to find and fix failing APIs.</p> <p>We are looking for a high-ownership, product-oriented infrastructure engineer to help us scale our product to bigger users. Postman Insights works by watching API traffic at the network level, in real-time. You’ll get to work on exciting scaling problems, balancing long-term infrastructure goals with short-to-medium term product needs.</p> <p><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OHMxgRuW9H8&amp;t=3370s">Watch our launch demo</a> from POST/CON.</p> <h2><strong>What you’ll do</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Design, build, and scale our backend infrastructure to process time-series network traffic, at large scale, in real-time.</li> <li>Build and maintain AI algorithms to analyze time-series network data to improve API discovery, metrics, and more.</li> <li>Take ownership of the engineering roadmap for the backend infrastructure of Postman Insights, setting the technical direction and priorities.</li> <li>Collaborate with documentation and marketing teams to help explain the capabilities and limitations that the infrastructure unlocks.</li> <li>Partner with the broader team to make design and architecture decisions for Postman Insights.</li> <li>Support the engineering manager in growing the team by contributing to technical planning, onboarding new members, and participating in hiring efforts.</li> </ul> <h2><strong>About you</strong></h2> <p>You’re an engineer who thrives on diving into the unknown, collaborating with others, and tackling challenging, complex problems with a can-do attitude. You have a passion for delivering seamless and delightful experiences to users, no matter how intricate the technical hurdles may be.</p> <p>As one of the first dedicated engineers in the platform area for Postman Insights, you’ll play a critical role in shaping the foundation of this team. Your work will not only directly impact the success of our platform but also set the stage for expanding the team and scaling our capabilities in this space.</p> <h3>Previous Experience</h3> <p>Must have:</p> <ul> <li>7+ years of experience shipping production-grade software.</li> <li>Experience scaling large-scale software systems.</li> <li>Proven ability to work independently, with at least two significant projects where you were either the primary contributor delivering substantial portions of the work and/or led a team of engineers to successfully execute the project.</li> <li>Strong communication skills, with a track record of aligning cross-functional stakeholders and unblocking challenges to meet business objectives.</li> <li>Based in the San Francisco Bay Area.</li> </ul> <p>Nice-to-have:</p> <ul> <li>Experience working on an early-stage product.</li> <li>Experience working with time-series data.</li> <li>Experience collaborating with distributed teams across multiple time zones.</li> </ul> <p>The reasonably estimated base salary for this role ranges from $210,000 to 240,000, plus a competitive equity package. Actual compensation is based on the candidate's skills, qualifications, and experience.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><h2 data-renderer-start-pos="4036"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">What Else?</strong></h2> <p data-renderer-start-pos="4048">In addition to Postman's pay-on-performance philosophy, and a flexible schedule working with a fun, collaborative team, Postman offers a comprehensive set of benefits, including full medical coverage, flexible PTO, wellness reimbursement, and a monthly lunch stipend. Along with that, our wellness programs will help you stay in the best of your physical and mental health. Our frequent and fascinating team-building events will keep you connected, while our donation-matching program can support the causes you care about. We’re building a long-term company with an inclusive culture where everyone can be the best version of themselves.&nbsp;</p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="4048">At Postman we value in person collaboration. We are in office 5 days a week for all roles based out of our hubs in San Francisco Bay Area, Boston, Austin, Tokyo and London. For roles based in Bangalore, employees currently work in the office three days a week and will transition to five days per week by the end of the year. We were thoughtful in our approach which is based on collaboration and grounded in feedback from our workforce, leadership team, and peers. The benefits of our in office model will be shared knowledge, brainstorming sessions, communication, and building trust in-person that cannot be replicated via zoom.</p> <h2 data-renderer-start-pos="3620"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">Our Values</strong></h2> <p data-renderer-start-pos="3633">At Postman, we create with the same curiosity that we see in our users. Our inclusive work culture ensures that everyone is valued equally as important pieces of our final product. We are dedicated to delivering the best products we can.</p> <h2><strong>Equal opportunity</strong></h2> <p data-renderer-start-pos="4048">Postman is an Equal Employment Opportunity and Affirmative Action Employer. title: Software Engineer - Frontend, Performance and Monitoring
description: <div class="content-intro"><h2><strong>Who Are We?</strong></h2> <p>Postman is the world’s leading API platform, used by more than 45 million+ developers and 500,000 organizations, including 98% of the Fortune 500. Postman is helping developers and professionals across the globe build the API-first world by simplifying each step of the API lifecycle and streamlining collaboration—enabling users to create better APIs, faster.</p> <p>The company is headquartered in San Francisco and has offices in Boston, New York, Austin, Tokyo, London, and Bangalore - where Postman was founded. Postman is privately held, with funding from Battery Ventures, BOND, Coatue, CRV, Insight Partners, and Nexus Venture Partners. Learn more at postman.com or connect with Postman on X via @getpostman.</p> <p>P.S: We highly recommend reading <a href="https://api-first-world.com/">The "API-First World" graphic novel</a> to understand the bigger picture and our vision at Postman.</p></div><div> <h2><strong>About the Team</strong></h2> <p>The Performance Automation and Monitoring team builds the systems that ensure Postman’s products are reliable, performant, and enterprise-ready. We own performance testing, monitoring platforms, and the user experiences that surface quality and performance signals, directly impacting customer trust and paid adoption.</p> <h2><strong>What You'll Do</strong></h2> </div> <ul> <li> <p>Build and maintain scalable, high-performance frontend systems for enterprise-grade performance testing and monitoring platforms</p> </li> <li> <p>Design and implement data-rich dashboards that visualize performance, reliability, and quality signals in an intuitive way</p> </li> <li> <p>Collaborate closely with backend, platform, product, and design clear, actionable user experiences for internal teams and enterprise customers</p> </li> </ul> <h2><strong>About You</strong></h2> <ul> <li> <p>3-5 years experience as a Software Engineer</p> </li> <li> <p>Have strong experience building production-grade UIs using React, TypeScript, and modern JavaScript</p> </li> <li> <p>Have built complex, data-intensive dashboards or platforms and care deeply about usability and performance</p> </li> <li> <p>Are comfortable working with API-driven systems and collaborating with backend engineers</p> </li> <li> <p>Enjoy owning problems end to end and influencing product direction through technical work</p> </li> <li> <p>Are comfortable working with distributed teams across time zones&nbsp;</p> </li> </ul> <div> <blockquote> <div><span id="m_7312527761389414644m_7637157178449758103gmail-docs-internal-guid-f7dd9ba5-7fff-758d-fd10-c86e8837b52a"></span></div> </blockquote> </div><div class="content-conclusion"><h2 title: AI Developer Advocate
description: <div> <h3><strong>About Imbue</strong></h3> <p>Imbue is a radically different AI company.&nbsp;We believe that data should belong to you, humans should come before technology, and everyone deserves to own a personal team of AI agents. We believe in a future of <em>open </em>agents that you can modify to do exactly what you<em> </em>want. We’re building a suite of tools to make tech serve humanity, and making it open source.&nbsp;</p> <p>Some first projects include</p> <ul> <li><a href="https://github.com/imbue-ai/mng">mngr</a>: A command-line tool for managing agents&nbsp;</li> <li><a href="https://github.com/imbue-ai/vet">Vet</a>: A standalone tool that catches AI coding mistakes and reviews full PRs&nbsp;</li> <li><a href="https://github.com/imbue-ai/offload">Offload</a>: A tool that automatically distributes your tests to run in isolated sandboxes&nbsp;</li> <li><a href="https://github.com/imbue-ai/latchkey">Latchkey</a>: A command-line tool to integrate local agents with third-party APIs&nbsp;</li> <li><a href="https://github.com/imbue-ai/darwinian_evolver">Darwinian Evolver</a>: A near-universal optimizer for code and agents&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p>And we’re just getting started. If you’re excited about building a future with open agents, say hi!&nbsp;</p> <p>We're supported by investors like Nvidia, Simon Last (co-founder of Notion), and Eric Schmidt (former CEO of Google), with $200M raised at over $1B valuation.<br><br></p> <h3><strong>About the Role</strong></h3> <p>You’ll be the conduit between Imbue's products and the developer communities they empower — helping us reach builders, curious engineers, and early adopters to build a strong and engaging community. This is the company’s first developer advocate role. You’ll experiment with different content types, community channels, and help shape how open software is created in the age of AI. You live on the internet. Not metaphorically, you're genuinely plugged in across every platform that matters. You’re specifically active on all things AI and Agent Tech Twitter and you’ve explored OpenClaw, ideally from its beginnings as Clawd.</p> <p>We aim to make Imbue a beloved brand in developer communities, and you'll be a driving force behind that. As the voice of our company, and our founders, you’ll write and publish content to elevate our presence in a playful, and proactive direction (<a href="https://x.com/kanjun/status/1973061372608180366">check out our launch video!</a>)</p> <p>Our message is simple and worth fighting for: technology is meant to serve humans, not the other way around. Your job is to make the world hear it.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h3><strong>What You'll Do</strong></h3> <p><strong>Own our channels!</strong></p> <ul> <li>Evangelize what we’re building and why it matters on X(Twitter), GitHub, LinkedIn, Hacker News, and across developer forums.</li> <li>Help shape conversations around Imbue’s developer tools. Posting, engaging, replying, and building community in real time, all the time.</li> <li>Manage and grow our X account as a primary channel for reaching developers, founders, and technical builders.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Build content&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Evangelize Imbue’s mission, software, and features. Turn the technical details of what we build into relatable messaging, video demos, use case examples, and stories that developers trust.</li> <li>Create documentation that is accurate and useful. Improve onboarding, nurtures, and our documentation structure to set new users up for success and reduce friction.</li> <li>Write on behalf of Imbue’s technical co-founders, Kanjun and Josh, and help them build personal brands that amplify the mission.</li> <li>Identify opportunities and drive adoption to Imbue’s open source projects on GitHub. Enrich ReadMe’s, jumpstart discussions, raise issues, and foster growth to help our repos trend within the platform.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>You are someone who</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Lives and works in the San Francisco Bay Area!</li> <li>Worked as a software engineer at a tech startup or regularly contributes to open source</li> <li>Enjoys building communities and wants to shape the future of software, together&nbsp;</li> <li>Regularly hacks, builds, and tries the latest coding agents, tools, and features on day one of release</li> <li>Thinks and writes in posts: you're always noticing things that would make sharp, punchy content</li> <li>Gets excited about turning complex technical ideas into accessible and fun stories<br><br></li> </ul> </div> <h3>Compensation and Benefits</h3> <ul> <li>Company paid medical, dental, and vision for you and your dependents</li> <li>$250 lifestyle stipend per month</li> <li>Flexible PTO</li> <li>Lunch provided daily for onsite employees</li> <li>Support for self-improvement: coaching, courses, and conferences</li> <li>Company offsites—past locations include NYC, Santa Cruz, Hawai'i, and Tokyo</li> <li>Frequent team events, dinners, and fun activities</li> <li>Compensation packages are highly variable based on a variety of factors. If your salary requirements fall outside of the stated range, we still encourage you to apply. The salary range for this role is $140,000–$200,000 USD.<br><br></li> </ul> <h3>How to apply</h3> <div>All submissions are reviewed by a person, so we encourage you to include notes on why you're interested in working with us. If you have any other work that you can showcase (open source code, side projects, etc.), certainly include it! We know that talent comes from many backgrounds, and we aim to build a team with diverse skillsets that spike strongly in different areas.</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>We try to reply either way within a week or two at most (usually much sooner).</div>
role_note: title 'AI Developer Advocate' matches role 'AI Developer'

title: AI Creative Head
description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About PhonePe Limited:</strong></p> <p>Headquartered in India, its flagship product, the PhonePe digital payments app, was launched in Aug 2016. As of April 2025, PhonePe has over 60 Crore (600 Million) registered users and a digital payments acceptance network spread across over 4 Crore (40+ million) merchants. PhonePe also processes over 33 Crore (330+ Million) transactions daily with an Annualized Total Payment Value (TPV) of over INR 150 lakh crore.&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>PhonePe’s portfolio of businesses includes the distribution of financial products (Insurance,&nbsp;Lending, and Wealth) as well as new consumer tech businesses (Pincode - hyperlocal e-commerce and Indus AppStore Localized App Store for the Android ecosystem) in India,&nbsp;which are aligned with the company’s vision to offer every Indian an equal opportunity to&nbsp;accelerate their progress by unlocking the flow of money and access to services.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Culture:</strong></p> <p>At PhonePe, we go the extra mile to make sure you can bring your best self to work, Everyday!. And that starts with creating the right environment for you. We empower people and trust them to do the right&nbsp; thing. Here, you own your work from start to finish, right from day one. PhonePe-rs solve complex problems and execute quickly; often building frameworks from scratch. If you’re excited by the idea of building platforms that touch millions, ideating with some of&nbsp; the best minds in the country and executing on your dreams with purpose and speed, join us!</p> <p><video controls="controls" width="300" height="150"> <source src="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1mkZstuTlMFTM8sDh1x4NYm7WSLueqklb/view?resourcekey"></video></p></div><h3><strong>The Mandate</strong></h3> <p>PhonePe Group is building one of India’s first fully AI-native marketing organizations. We are not just looking for someone to experiment with AI. We want a leader who will change how our team of over 100 marketers thinks, works, and delivers. The AI Creative Head is the architect of this transformation. You will own the strategy, infrastructure, and culture change needed to empower every marketer at PhonePe. You will build a team of AI specialists, create the playbook, and set the metrics. You will be accountable for measurable improvements in marketing speed, creative quality, and operational efficiency. This is a strategic leadership role, not just a hands-on position. You will report directly to the HOD and help design the future of our marketing.</p> <h3><strong>Core Competencies</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Visionary Curiosity:</strong> You anticipate AI trends rather than just tracking them. You have been building with AI tools since the early days. You can see where the industry will be in a year and prepare the organization to get there first.</li> <li><strong>Focus on Architecture:</strong> You have moved beyond simple prototyping. You think in terms of scalable workflows, governance frameworks, and team structures that will last.</li> <li><strong>Executive Influence:</strong> You can confidently explain to senior leadership why AI needs budget, headcount, and strategic priority. You focus on business outcomes instead of just tool features.</li> <li><strong>Culture Engineering:</strong> You understand that new tools fail without a change in mindset. You have successfully built cultures of experimentation in the past.</li> <li><strong>Innovation with Accountability:</strong> You push boundaries while measuring everything. You can link every AI initiative to time saved, revenue growth, or improved quality.</li> <li><strong>Macro Understanding:</strong> You have a deep understanding of consumer behavior. You can spot cultural shifts and turn them into marketing strategies that connect with our diverse users.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>What You Will Own</strong></h3> <p><strong> AI Transformation Strategy &amp; Roadmap</strong></p> <ul> <li>Define the annual AI adoption plan for the entire marketing organization.</li> <li>Identify and prioritize the most impactful AI use cases based on feasibility and team readiness.</li> <li>Build the business case for AI integration by projecting efficiency gains, resource optimization, and quality improvements.</li> <li>Share quarterly progress and recommendations with executive leadership using clear metrics.</li> </ul> <p><strong> Building &amp; Leading the Team</strong></p> <ul> <li>Hire and develop a team of AI specialists and prompt engineers to work alongside marketing squads.</li> <li>Design the best organizational structure for the AI function.</li> <li>Create performance frameworks and career paths for this entirely new team.</li> </ul> <p><strong> AI Infrastructure &amp; Tooling Ecosystem</strong></p> <ul> <li>Manage the marketing AI stack by evaluating and integrating tools like language models, image generators, and workflow automation.</li> <li>Build and maintain a central playbook containing prompt libraries, workflow templates, and compliance guidelines.</li> <li>Design workflows using tools like N8N, Zapier, Make, and custom APIs to automate marketing tasks.</li> <li>Set up quality control processes, including brand safety checks and human review for AI-generated content.</li> </ul> <p><strong> Cross-Functional Enablement &amp; Change Management</strong></p> <ul> <li>Run a structured training program with onboarding, skill assessments, and ongoing learning for over 100 marketers.</li> <li>Work closely with Product, Engineering, Data Science, and Legal teams to ensure tools are compliant and scalable.</li> <li>Track adoption metrics closely, including active usage, completion rates, and team satisfaction.</li> <li>Act as the internal champion for AI transformation by presenting at meetings and building excitement.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Creative &amp; Performance Impact</strong></p> <ul> <li>Drive measurable improvements in creative output speed and campaign iteration.</li> <li>Work with performance marketing leads to integrate AI into media buying and creative optimization.</li> <li>Collaborate with brand and content teams to produce higher-quality content faster while protecting brand integrity.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Skills Required</strong></h3> <p><strong>Gen AI Mastery</strong></p> <ul> <li>You have built reliable, production-grade AI workflows at scale.</li> <li>You have deep experience with language models like GPT, Claude, and Gemini.</li> <li>You are experienced with image generation tools like Midjourney and DALL-E, and video tools like Runway.</li> <li>You understand prompt engineering, architecture frameworks, and when to build versus buy.</li> <li>You can quickly evaluate new AI tools and make confident decisions.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Marketing Domain Depth</strong></p> <ul> <li>You have 8 to 12 or more years of marketing experience across areas like performance marketing, brand strategy, or growth.</li> <li>You have managed large-scale marketing operations with high budgets and teams of over 10 people.</li> <li>You understand the full marketing stack, including paid media, CRM platforms, analytics, and creative production.</li> <li>Experience in fintech or high-growth consumer apps is highly preferred.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Leadership &amp; Stakeholder Management</strong></p> <ul> <li>You have a proven track record of building teams in fast-moving environments.</li> <li>You can communicate clearly and effectively with executives and the board.</li> <li>You are an expert in change management and driving the adoption of new processes.</li> <li>You collaborate seamlessly with technical and legal teams without needing close supervision.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Mindset to Succeed</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Total Ownership:</strong> You take responsibility for the outcome of AI transformation across the entire marketing organization. If a team is not adopting AI, you step in to help them.<br><br></li> <li><strong>Comfort with Ambiguity:</strong> You thrive in a constantly changing landscape where there is no existing playbook. You are energized by building processes from scratch. You make strong decisions with incomplete information and adjust quickly.<br><br></li> <li><strong>Systems Thinking:</strong> You focus on building repeatable systems and frameworks that solve problems across the entire organization.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Ideal Candidate Profile</strong></h3> <ul> <li>8 to 12 or more years in marketing, with at least 2 to 3 years leading teams of 5 or more.</li> <li>Hands-on experience building AI workflows and automati

title: AI Production Lead

And that starts with creating the right environment for you. We empower people and trust them to do the right&nbsp; thing. Here, you own your work from start to finish, right from day one. PhonePe-rs solve complex problems and execute quickly; often building frameworks from scratch. If you’re excited by the idea of building platforms that touch millions, ideating with some of&nbsp; the best minds in the country and executing on your dreams with purpose and speed, join us!</p> <p><video controls="controls" width="300" height="150"> <source src="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1mkZstuTlMFTM8sDh1x4NYm7WSLueqklb/view?resourcekey"></video></p></div><p><strong>About The Role&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>This is a senior leadership position where you work alongside the Group CMO, the Content Head, and the Youtube strategy lead to build a world-class, AI-first content factory. You are the architect of our production engine. Your job is to take high-level concepts and turn them into finished products that set a new standard for the industry. You lead a diverse team of creators, editors, and designers with an AI-first mindset and lead our relationships with global creative agencies. You are a workflow builder who is obsessed with finding faster and better ways to produce content without ever letting the quality slip.</p> <p><strong>Focus Area 1: Strategic Leadership</strong>&nbsp;</p> <p>You are the conductor of the factory. You don't just execute, you lead the way.</p> <ul> <li>You work directly with the Group CMO and Content Head to make sure our production output matches the big-picture brand goals.</li> <li>You lead the internal team of creators, editors, designers, DOPs, and Video Specialists.</li> <li>You are responsible for their daily output and making sure they are operating at peak performance.</li> <li>You manage the production roadmap. You decide how we use our resources and you make the final call on what we build in-house versus what we send to outside partners.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Focus Area 2: World-Class Agency Management</strong>&nbsp;</p> <p>You are our main link to the best creative minds in the world.</p> <ul> <li>You will manage relationships and output with top-tier agencies like Ogilvy, Dentsu, or specialized production houses.</li> <li>You make sure these external partners are integrated into our AI-first ways of working. Their delivery must match our internal speed and technical standards.</li> <li>You lead the negotiations and the daily management of these partnerships to ensure we are always getting world-class results.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Focus Area 3: Quality Gatekeeping</strong>&nbsp;</p> <p>You are the final line of defense for our brand.</p> <ul> <li>You are the ultimate judge of quality. You ensure that every frame, every cut, and every thumbnail meets our high visual and storytelling standards.</li> <li>You run the final review process. You have the eye to catch the small errors in sound, editing, or visual consistency that others might miss.</li> <li>You balance the speed of AI with human emotion. You make sure the final product feels premium and authentic, never substandard or robotic.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Focus Area 4: AI Systems and Workflow Architecture</strong>&nbsp;</p> <p>You own the "how" of our factory. You build the digital production line.</p> <ul> <li><strong>Build End-to-End Pipelines:</strong> You design the step-by-step systems that move a project from a finished script to a final render. You find ways to connect different AI tools so the work flows seamlessly without manual restarts.</li> <li><strong>Deploy AI Agents:</strong> You set up and manage AI agents to handle specialized, repetitive tasks. This could be anything from agents that automatically source b-roll to agents that handle audio cleanup or initial color grading.</li> <li><strong>Automate for Scale:</strong> You are obsessed with removing bottlenecks. You find the parts of production that take the most time and you build an AI-driven solution to automate them.</li> <li><strong>Tool Integration:</strong> You stay ahead of the curve. You are the one testing new AI video models and automated editing tools, deciding exactly how they should be used by the team to increase our speed.</li> </ul> <p><strong>What We Are Looking For</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>AI Fluency: </strong>You are a power user of AI. You don't just use it for simple tasks; you understand how to build workflows and chain different AI tools together to solve complex production problems.</li> <li><strong>Technical Agility:</strong> You are a fast learner who can master new tech by lunch. You understand everything from traditional cinematography to the latest AI video models.</li> <li><strong>Senior Management Experience:</strong> You have a proven track record of leading large creative teams and managing big-name agencies.</li> <li><strong>Attention to Detail:</strong> You have an obsessive eye for quality. You don't settle for "good enough" and you push the team to deliver excellence.</li> <li><strong>Problem Solving:</strong> You are a builder. You don't wait for a plan to be handed to you. You see a bottleneck and you build a prototype to clear it.</li> <li><strong>High Ownership:</strong> You treat this factory as if it were your own company. You take full responsibility for the output, the deadlines, and the quality.</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>PhonePe Full Time Employee Benefits (Not applicable for Intern or Contract Roles)</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Insurance Benefits - </strong>Medical Insurance, Critical Illness Insurance, Accidental Insurance, Life Insurance</li> <li><strong>Wellness Program -</strong> Employee Assistance Program, Onsite Medical Center, Emergency Support System</li> <li><strong>Parental Support - </strong>Maternity Benefit, Paternity Benefit Program, Adoption Assistance Program, Day-care Support Program</li> <li><strong>Mobility Benefits - </strong>Relocation benefits, Transfer Support Policy, Travel Policy</li> <li><strong>Retirement Benefits - </strong>Employee PF Contribution, Flexible PF Contribution, Gratuity, NPS, Leave Encashment&nbsp;</li> <li><strong>Other Benefits - </strong>Higher Education Assistance, Car Lease, Salary Advance Policy</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong><em>Our inclusive culture promotes individual expression, creativity, innovation, and achievement and in turn helps us better understand and serve our customers. We see ourselves as a place for intellectual curiosity,&nbsp; ideas and debates, where diverse perspectives lead to deeper understanding and better quality results. PhonePe is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to treating all its employees and job applicants equally; regardless of&nbsp; gender, sexual preference, religion, race, color or disability. If you have a disability or special need that requires assistance or reasonable accommodation, during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, </em></strong><a href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc-ETchy2LsQ_DjlNXOUcGfI182DnA533YZTLfVw5TkJH-Stw/viewform"><strong><em>please fill out this form.</em></strong></a></p> <p><strong><em>Read more about PhonePe</em></strong><a href="https://www.phonepe.com/blog/"><strong><em> on our blog</em></strong></a><strong><em>.</em></strong></p> <p><a href="https://www.phonepe.com/blog/life-at-phonepe/"><strong>Life at PhonePe</strong></a></p> <p><

title: AI Script Generator
description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About PhonePe Limited:</strong></p> <p>Headquartered in India, its flagship product, the PhonePe digital payments app, was launched in Aug 2016. As of April 2025, PhonePe has over 60 Crore (600 Million) registered users and a digital payments acceptance network spread across over 4 Crore (40+ million) merchants. PhonePe also processes over 33 Crore (330+ Million) transactions daily with an Annualized Total Payment Value (TPV) of over INR 150 lakh crore.&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>PhonePe’s portfolio of businesses includes the distribution of financial products (Insurance,&nbsp;Lending, and Wealth) as well as new consumer tech businesses (Pincode - hyperlocal e-commerce and Indus AppStore Localized App Store for the Android ecosystem) in India,&nbsp;which are aligned with the company’s vision to offer every Indian an equal opportunity to&nbsp;accelerate their progress by unlocking the flow of money and access to services.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Culture:</strong></p> <p>At PhonePe, we go the extra mile to make sure you can bring your best self to work, Everyday!. And that starts with creating the right environment for you. We empower people and trust them to do the right&nbsp; thing. Here, you own your work from start to finish, right from day one. PhonePe-rs solve complex problems and execute quickly; often building frameworks from scratch. If you’re excited by the idea of building platforms that touch millions, ideating with some of&nbsp; the best minds in the country and executing on your dreams with purpose and speed, join us!</p> <p><video controls="controls" width="300" height="150"> <source src="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1mkZstuTlMFTM8sDh1x4NYm7WSLueqklb/view?resourcekey"></video></p></div><p>What you will do</p> <ul> <li><strong>Turn Strategy into Scripts: </strong>You are a writer who knows how to tell a story. Your job is to take the strategy ideas from our specialists and turn them into finished scripts that are ready for the camera.</li> <li><strong>Run the AI Machine:</strong> You won’t be writing these from scratch. Instead, you will run a system of AI agents and workflows that do the research and the first drafts for you.</li> <li><strong>Manage Digital Agents:</strong> You will spend your time managing these AI agents to make sure they are finding the right information and putting it into the right words.</li> <li><strong>The Human Polish</strong>: Once the agents give you a draft, you step in to polish it. You will rewrite the hooks to make them better, fix the pacing so it sounds natural, and make sure the final script is simple, clear, and human.</li> <li><strong>Own the Engine:</strong> You are also responsible for the engine itself. If the AI is giving you boring or robotic results, you don’t just fix the text. You look at the workflow and the instructions you gave the agents and you fix the system so the next script comes out better.</li> <li><strong>Verify Everything:</strong> You use AI tools to double check every fact in the script to make sure everything we say is accurate.</li> </ul> <ul> <li><strong>Voice Training:</strong> You will be responsible for teaching our AI models how we talk. This means creating style guides and logic that the AI uses so that every script sounds like our brand, regardless of which agent produced it.</li> <li><strong>Engagement Logic: </strong>You aren't just looking at words; you are looking at the structure.</li> <li><strong>Scaling Knowledge:</strong> Since you are using workflows, you will be expected to handle multiple projects at once. You’ll be the air traffic controller for several different video scripts moving through the AI pipeline at the same time.</li> </ul> <p>What we are looking for</p> <ul> <li><strong>Scripting Knowledge:</strong> You know how to write for YouTube. You understand how to keep people watching and how to make a script easy for a creator to read on camera.</li> <li><strong>AI Fluency:</strong> You are already comfortable using AI for more than just simple prompts. You know how to use workflows and agents to get complex work done at a very high speed.</li> <li><strong>Analytical Thinking:</strong> You can look at a lot of information and quickly figure out what is important and what is just noise.</li> <li><strong>Problem Solving:</strong> When a script isn't working or the AI system gets stuck, you are the person who figures out a way to fix it.</li> <li><strong>High Ownership:</strong> You are responsible for the final words. Even though you use AI to help, you own the quality of every script that goes to production.</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>PhonePe Full Time Employee Benefits (Not applicable for Intern or Contract Roles)</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Insurance Benefits - </strong>Medical Insurance, Critical Illness Insurance, Accidental Insurance, Life Insurance</li> <li><strong>Wellness Program -</strong> Employee Assistance Program, Onsite Medical Center, Emergency Support System</li> <li><strong>Parental Support - </strong>Maternity Benefit, Paternity Benefit Program, Adoption Assistance Program, Day-care Support Program</li> <li><strong>Mobility Benefits - </strong>Relocation benefits, Transfer Support Policy, Travel Policy</li> <li><strong>Retirement Benefits - </strong>Employee PF Contribution, Flexible PF Contribution, Gratuity, NPS, Leave Encashment&nbsp;</li> <li><strong>Other Benefits - </strong>Higher Education Assistance, Car Lease, Salary Advance Policy</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong><em>Our inclusive culture promotes individual expression, creativity, innovation, and achievement and in turn helps us better understand and serve our customers. We see ourselves as a place for intellectual curiosity,&nbsp; ideas and debates, where diverse perspectives lead to deeper understanding and better quality results. PhonePe is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to treating all its employees and job applicants equally; regardless of&nbsp; gender, sexual preference, religion, race, color or disability. If you have a disability or special need that requires assistance or reasonable accommodation, during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, </em></strong><a href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc-ETchy2LsQ_DjlNXOUcGfI182DnA533YZTLfVw5TkJH-Stw/viewform"><strong><em>please fill out this form.</em></strong></a></p> <p><strong><em>Read more about PhonePe</em></strong><a href="https://www.phonepe.com/blog/"><strong><em> on our blog</em></strong></a><strong><em>.</em></strong></p> <p><a href="https://www.phonepe.com/blog/life-at-phonepe/"><strong>Life at PhonePe</strong></a></p> <p><a href="https://www.phonepe.com/press/"><strong>PhonePe in the news</strong></a></p></div>

title: Applied AI Architect, Startups
description: <div class="content-intro"><h2><strong>About Anthropic</strong></h2> <p>Anthropic’s mission is to create reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems. We want AI to be safe and beneficial for our users and for society as a whole. Our team is a quickly growing group of committed researchers, engineers, policy experts, and business leaders working together to build beneficial AI systems.</p></div><h2><strong>About the role</strong></h2> <p>As a Solutions Architect on the Startups Applied AI team at Anthropic, you will win the trust of founders and engineers by being an exceptional technical partner, helping startups successfully build on the Claude Developer Platform as they grow from early product to scale. You'll combine deep technical expertise with a builder-first mindset to help startups architect innovative LLM solutions, win technical evaluations, and get the most out of Claude.</p> <p>Working closely with Account Executives and the broader Sales, Product, and Engineering teams, you'll guide startups from initial technical discovery through successful deployment and beyond. You'll leverage your expertise to help founders understand Claude's capabilities, develop evals, and design architectures that maximize the value of our AI systems.</p> <h2><strong>Responsibilities:</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Partner with Account Executives to deeply understand startup requirements, translate them into technical solutions, and serve as a trusted technical advisor throughout the Claude adoption journey from initial evaluation through deployment and expansion</li> <li>Win technical evaluations that demonstrate why Claude is the best foundation for what startups are building, helping them develop evaluation frameworks to measure Claude's performance for their specific use cases</li> <li>Build technical credibility with founders, founding engineers, and startup engineering teams by speaking their language, understanding their build patterns, and guiding technical architecture decisions</li> <li>Gather insights on how startups are building with Claude, identify emerging use cases and deployment patterns, and deliver feedback to Product and Engineering teams</li> <li>Travel to customer sites, startup-focused events, and industry conferences for workshops, technical deep dives, and relationship building</li> </ul> <h2><strong>You may be a good fit if you have:</strong></h2> <ul> <li>5+ years of experience in technical customer-facing roles such as Solutions Architect, Sales Engineer, Forward Deployed Engineer, or technical founder who has done founder-led sales</li> <li>Experience working with startups or high-growth technology companies; you understand the velocity and constraints of early-stage companies</li> <li>Strong builder credibility through experience as a software engineer or technical founder; you speak the language of builders and have the presence to earn the trust of technical founders and startup engineering teams</li> <li>Deep technical proficiency with building and scaling AI products, a pulse on AI engineering best practices, and the ability to demonstrate why Claude is the best foundation</li> <li>Hands-on experience building and deploying LLM-powered applications in production, with expertise in context engineering, evaluation frameworks, and modern AI architectures</li> <li>Strong technical communication skills with the ability to translate complex AI concepts into actionable insights for founders and engineering teams</li> <li>Track record of selling technical products in competitive markets</li> <li>Comfortable with Python and familiarity with common LLM frameworks, tools, and integration patterns</li> <li>Passion for making powerful technology safe and societally beneficial</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>The annual compensation range for this role is listed below.&nbsp;</p> <p>For sales roles, the range provided is the role’s On Target Earnings ("OTE") range, meaning that the range includes both the sales commissions/sales bonuses target and annual base salary for the role.</p></div><div class="title">Annual Salary:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>£150,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>£170,000 GBP</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><h2><strong>Logistics</strong></h2> <p><strong>Minimum education: </strong>Bachelor’s degree or an equivalent combination of education, training, and/or experience</p> <p><strong>Required field of study:&nbsp;</strong>A field relevant to the role as demonstrated through coursework, training, or professional experience</p> <p><strong>Minimum years of experience: </strong>Years of experience required will correlate with the internal job level requirements for the position</p> <p><strong>Location-based hybrid policy:</strong> Currently, we expect all staff to be in one of our offices at least 25% of the time. However, some roles may require more time in our offices.</p> <p><strong data-stringify-type="bold">Visa sponsorship:</strong>&nbsp;We do sponsor visas! However, we aren't able to successfully sponsor visas for every role and every candidate. But if we make you an offer, we will make every reasonable effort to get you a visa, and we retain an immigration lawyer to help with this.</p> <p><strong>We encourage you to apply even if you do not believe you meet every single qualification.</strong> Not all strong candidates will meet every single qualification as listed.&nbsp; Research shows that people who identify as being from underrepresented groups are more prone to experiencing imposter syndrome and doubting the strength of their candidacy, so we urge you not to exclude yourself prematurely and to submit an application if you're interested in this work. We think AI systems like the ones we're building have enormous social and ethical implications. We think this makes representation even more important, and we strive to include a range of diverse perspectives on our team.<br><br><strong data-stringify-type="bold">Your safety matters to us.</strong> To protect yourself from potential scams, remember that Anthropic recruiters only contact you from&nbsp;@anthropic.com&nbsp;email addresses. In some cases, we may partner with vetted recruiting agencies who will identify themselves as working on behalf of Anthropic. Be cautious of emails from other domains. Legitimate Anthropic recruiters will never ask for money, fees, or banking information before your first day. If you're ever unsure about a communication, don't click any links—visit&nbsp;<u data-stringify-type="underline"><a class="c-link c-link--underline" href="http://anthropic.com/careers" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="http://anthropic.com/careers" data-sk="tooltip_parent" data-remove-tab-index="true">anthropic.com/careers</a></u>&nbsp;directly for confirmed position openings.</p> <h2><strong>How we're different</strong></h2> <p>We believe that the highest-impact AI research will be big science. At Anthropic we work as a single cohesive team on just a few large-scale research efforts. And we value impact — advancing our long-term goals of steerable, trustworthy AI — rather than work on smaller and more specific puzzles. We view AI research as an empirical science, which has as much in common with physics and biology as with traditional efforts in computer science. We're an extremely collaborative group, and we host frequent research discussions to ensure that we are pursuing the highest-impact work at any given time. As such, we greatly value communication skills.</p> <p>The easiest way to understand our research directions is to read our recent research. This research continues many of the directions our team worked on prior to Anthropic, including: GPT-3, Circuit-Based Interpretability, Multimodal Neurons, Scaling Laws, AI &amp; Compute, Concrete Problems in AI Safety, and Learning from Human Preferences.</p> <h2><strong>Come work with us!</strong></h2> <p>Anthropic is a public benefit corporation headquartered in San Francisco. We offer competitive compensation and benefits, optional equity donation matching, generous vacation and parental leave, flexible working hours, and a lovely office space in which to collaborate with colleagues. <strong data-stringify-type="bold">Guidance on Candidates' AI Usage:</strong>&nbsp;Learn about&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://www.anthropic.com/candidate-ai-guidance" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://www.anthropic.com/candidate-ai-guidance" data-sk="tooltip_parent">our policy</a> for using AI in our application process.</p></div>

title: Senior Software Engineer, Backend (Product Engineering)
location: New York, New York, United States
description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>Why join us</strong></p> <p>Brex is the intelligent finance platform that enables companies to spend smarter and move faster in more than 200 markets. By combining global corporate cards and banking with intuitive spend management, bill pay, and travel software, Brex enables founders and finance teams to accelerate operations, gain real-time visibility, and control spend effortlessly. Brex’s AI-native automation and world-class service eliminate manual expense and accounting tasks for customers so they can focus on what matters most. Tens of thousands of the world's best companies run on Brex, including DoorDash, Coinbase, Robinhood, Zoom, Plaid, Reddit, and SeatGeek.</p> <p>Working at Brex allows you to push your limits, challenge the status quo, and collaborate with some of the brightest minds in the industry. We’re committed to building a diverse team and inclusive culture and believe your potential should only be limited by how big you can dream. We make this a reality by empowering you with the tools, resources, and support you need to grow your career.</p></div><p><strong>Engineering at Brex</strong></p> <p>Engineering at Brex is about building systems that scale with speed and intention. Our teams span Software, Data, Security, and IT, and operate with high autonomy and deep collaboration. We tackle hard technical problems, own our outcomes, and push for excellence at every level — from architecture to deployment. It’s an environment where engineering is a craft, and builders become leaders.</p> <p><strong>What you’ll do</strong></p> <p>As an engineer at Brex, you will help develop new products from concept to launch, whether for a 5-person startup or a 5,000-person-strong enterprise. We’re looking for folks with an interest in building products and tools, and who are comfortable in dealing with lots of moving pieces. You’ll be building customer-facing products that will drive direct business impact and shape our long-term technical vision with a high-quality bar. You'll have the opportunity to learn and push the frontier of providing the best financial software experience to help companies grow. You’ll be encouraged to be metric and data-driven and to think creatively to help Brex scale and get prepared for the new markets we are about to enter.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Where you’ll work</strong></p> <p>This role will be based in our New York office. We are a hybrid environment that combines the energy and connections of being in the office with the benefits and flexibility of working from home. We currently require a minimum of three coordinated days in the office per week, Monday, Wednesday and Thursday. As a perk, we also have up to four weeks per year of fully remote work!</p> <p><strong>Responsibilities:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Collaborate with engineers across the company to build new features and products end-to-end.</li> <li>Work alongside user-facing teams like Sales and Support to deeply understand our customers' needs.</li> <li>Design and implement solutions to improve our customers' banking experiences.</li> <li>Own problems end-to-end, from user experience and data models to scalability, operability, and ongoing metrics.</li> <li>Tune and polish features to a high degree of excellence.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Requirements:</strong></p> <ul> <li>7+ years of professional experience designing, developing, and deploying applications with a focus on backend.</li> <li>Experience building and designing scalable backend systems</li> <li>Experience working with SQL or NoSQL databases</li> <li>Experience working with backend programming languages (Java, Kotlin, Python)</li> <li>Familiarity with software engineering development cycles</li> <li>Ability to hold yourself and the team to high standards</li> <li>Strong communication and interpersonal skills</li> </ul> <p><strong>Compensation:</strong></p> <p>The expected salary range for this role is $192,000-$240,000. However, the starting base pay will depend on a number of factors including the candidate’s location, skills, experience, market demands, and internal pay parity. Depending on the position offered, equity and other forms of compensation may be provided as part of a total compensation package.</p> <p>Brex LLC is a wholly owned subsidiary of Capital One, N.A.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><em>Please be aware, job-seekers may be at risk of targeting by malicious actors looking for personal data. Brex recruiters will only reach out via LinkedIn or email with a&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="http://brex.com/" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="http://brex.com" data-sk="tooltip_parent">brex.com</a>&nbsp;domain. Any outreach claiming to be from Brex via other sources should be ignored.</em></p></div>
role_note: title 'Senior Software Engineer, Backend (Product Engineering)' matches role 'Backend Engineer'

It’s an environment where engineering is a craft, and builders become leaders.</p> <p><strong>What you’ll do</strong></p> <p>As an engineer at Brex, you will help develop new products from concept to launch, whether for a 5-person startup or a 5,000-person-strong enterprise. We’re looking for folks with an interest in building products and tools, and who are comfortable in dealing with lots of moving pieces. You’ll be building customer-facing products that will drive direct business impact and shape our long-term technical vision with a high-quality bar. You'll have the opportunity to learn and push the frontier of providing the best financial software experience to help companies grow. You’ll be encouraged to be metric and data-driven and to think creatively to help Brex scale and get prepared for the new markets we are about to enter.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Where you’ll work</strong></p> <p>This role will be based in our San Francisco office. We are a hybrid environment that combines the energy and connections of being in the office with the benefits and flexibility of working from home. We currently require a minimum of three coordinated days in the office per week, Monday, Wednesday and Thursday. As a perk, we also have up to four weeks per year of fully remote work!</p> <p><strong>Responsibilities:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Collaborate with engineers across the company to build new features and products end-to-end.</li> <li>Work alongside user-facing teams like Sales and Support to deeply understand our customers' needs.</li> <li>Design and implement solutions to improve our customers' banking experiences.</li> <li>Own problems end-to-end, from user experience and data models to scalability, operability, and ongoing metrics.</li> <li>Tune and polish features to a high degree of excellence.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Requirements:</strong></p> <ul> <li>7+ years of professional experience designing, developing, and deploying applications with a focus on the backend.</li> <li>Experience building and designing scalable backend systems</li> <li>Experience working with SQL or NoSQL databases</li> <li>Experience working with backend programming languages (Java, Kotlin, Python)</li> <li>Familiarity with software engineering development cycles</li> <li>Ability to hold yourself and the team to high standards</li> <li>Strong communication and interpersonal skills</li> </ul> <p><strong>Compensation:</strong></p> <p>The expected salary range for this role is $192,000-$240,000. However, the starting base pay will depend on a number of factors including the candidate’s location, skills, experience, market demands, and internal pay parity. Depending on the position offered, equity and other forms of compensation may be provided as part of a total compensation package.</p> <p>Brex LLC is a wholly owned subsidiary of Capital One, N.A.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><em>Please be aware, job-seekers may be at risk of targeting by malicious actors looking for personal data. Brex recruiters will only reach out via LinkedIn or email with a&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="http://brex.com/" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="http://brex.com" data-sk="tooltip_parent">brex.com</a>&nbsp;domain. Any outreach claiming to be from Brex via other sources should be ignored.</em></p></div>

title: Senior Software Engineer, Full Stack
description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>Why join us</strong></p> <p>Brex is the intelligent finance platform that enables companies to spend smarter and move faster in more than 200 markets. By combining global corporate cards and banking with intuitive spend management, bill pay, and travel software, Brex enables founders and finance teams to accelerate operations, gain real-time visibility, and control spend effortlessly. Brex’s AI-native automation and world-class service eliminate manual expense and accounting tasks for customers so they can focus on what matters most. Tens of thousands of the world's best companies run on Brex, including DoorDash, Coinbase, Robinhood, Zoom, Plaid, Reddit, and SeatGeek.</p> <p>Working at Brex allows you to push your limits, challenge the status quo, and collaborate with some of the brightest minds in the industry. We’re committed to building a diverse team and inclusive culture and believe your potential should only be limited by how big you can dream. We make this a reality by empowering you with the tools, resources, and support you need to grow your career.</p></div><p><strong>Engineering at Brex</strong></p> <p>Engineering at Brex is about building systems that scale with speed and intention. Our teams span Software, Data, Security, and IT, and operate with high autonomy and deep collaboration. We tackle hard technical problems, own our outcomes, and push for excellence at every level — from architecture to deployment. It’s an environment where engineering is a craft, and builders become leaders.</p> <p><strong>What you’ll do</strong></p> <p>As a Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer on our Task Workflows Platform team, you will build and scale the foundational infrastructure that powers core experiences across Brex. You will work across our extensive suite of platforms - including our multi-channel notifications engine, collaborative commenting system, and dynamic workflow rule builder. You will also play a pivotal role in evolving our task orchestration infrastructure infrastructure, helping us transition from a centralized, generic experience into highly tailored, purpose-built solutions for specific product domains.</p> <p>You will tackle complex full-stack challenges, from designing scalable backend APIs and rule-evaluation engines for custom automations, to crafting intuitive frontend UX for our domain-specific task interfaces and workflow builders. Beyond core platform work, you will be part of a team that directly shapes broader product experiences - including leveraging AI to streamline user workflows and supporting the continuous evolution of our productivity tools in web and mobile.</p> <p><strong>Where you’ll work</strong></p> <p>This role will be based in&nbsp;Vancouver office. We are a hybrid environment that combines the energy and connections of being in the office with the benefits and flexibility of working from home. We currently require a minimum of three coordinated days in the office per week on Monday, Wednesday and Thursday. As a perk, we also have up to four weeks per year of fully remote work!</p> <p><strong>Responsibilities</strong></p> <ul> <li>Work with engineers across the company to build new features and products end-to-end</li> <li>Own problems end-to-end, thinking through everything from user experience, data models, scalability, operability and ongoing metrics.</li> <li>Provide technical leadership to team by driving roadmap direction, architectural design and mentorship</li> <li>Work side-by-side with user-facing teams (Sales, Support) to best understand the needs of our customers.</li> <li>Tune and polish features to a high degree of excellence.</li> <li>Identify and implement reliability and performance improvements</li> <li>Uphold our high engineering standards and bring consistency to the codebases, infrastructure, and processes you will encounter</li> </ul> <p><strong>Requirements</strong></p> <ul> <li>7+ years of professional experience designing, developing, and deploying full-stack products</li> <li>Strong proficiency in backend programming languages (Java, Kotlin, Python)</li> <li>Experience architecting, building, and maintaining scalable, high-availability distributed systems</li> <li>Experience designing and optimizing SQL and/or NoSQL databases, including data modeling, query performance tuning, and schema design</li> <li>Experience building and maintaining RESTful APIs and/or GraphQL services</li> <li>Experience with modern frontend technologies and tools like ES6+, React, TypeScript, and Webpack</li> </ul> <p><strong>Bonus points</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience collaborating with cross-functional stakeholders and specialists in product, design, and operations</li> <li>Experience driving initiatives at a broader level across an organization or company</li> <li>Experience running in-product experiments, A/B testing</li> <li>Experience and interest in leveraging AI developer tools</li> </ul> <p><strong>Compensation</strong></p> <p>The expected salary range for this role is $192,000 - $240,000 CAD. However, the starting base pay will depend on a number of factors, including the candidate’s location, skills, experience, market demands, and internal pay parity. Depending on the position offered, equity and other forms of compensation may be provided as part of a total compensation package.</p> <p>Brex LLC is a wholly owned subsidiary of Capital One, N.A.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><em>Please be aware, job-seekers may be at risk of targeting by malicious actors looking for personal data. Any outreach claiming to be from Brex via other sources should be ignored.</em></p></div>
