title: Account Executive, AI Sales
description: <h2><strong>Who we are </strong></h2> <h3><strong>About Stripe</strong></h3> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies - from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups - use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone's reach while doing the most important work of your career.</span></p> <h3 id="about-the-team">About the team</h3> <p>The AI team is focused on one of Stripe’s most strategic growth areas: enabling the monetization and scaling of AI-native and AI-enabled businesses. We’re in a unique position – partnering with the world’s most ambitious AI companies (the likes of OpenAI, Anthropic, NVIDIA, etc) building on the frontier of artificial intelligence -- across infrastructure, foundation models, agents, and applications -- to help them grow and commercialize globally using Stripe’s full financial stack.</p> <p>As part of Stripe’s GTM / Sales organization, this team works closely with Product, Engineering, and Marketing to shape Stripe’s AI GTM strategy and ensure that the world’s leading AI companies -- from early-stage innovators to the largest public players -- choose Stripe as their monetization platform.</p> <h3 id="what-youll-do">What you’ll do</h3> <ul> <li>Work with existing Stripe customers in the AI Industry to develop and execute long-term sales strategies to expand Stripe’s revenue</li> <li>Own the full sales cycle, from business case development, to deal structuring and negotiating, to close</li> <li>Develop account plans and cross sell into your list of strategic AI customers, driving growth through expansion and new revenue streams&nbsp;</li> <li>Drive deal strategy and commercial negotiations for large, complex renewals</li> <li>Develop relationships with executive stakeholders within your book of business, deeply understanding problems they are solving and helping drive to solutions</li> <li>Be responsible for account mapping and coordinating effective meetings with the appropriate external stakeholders expanding the customer relationship</li> <li>Lead and contribute to team projects to develop and refine our sales process and help shape the Stripe sales culture</li> </ul> <h3 id="minimum-requirements">Minimum requirements</h3> <ul> <li>* 6+ years of sales experience, preferably selling a technical product, with a track record of top performance<br> <ul> <li>4+ years leading complex sales cycles with Enterprise organizations required</li> <li>Ability to understand technical requirements and craft solutions across multiple products</li> <li>Ability to develop and execute account plans spanning multiple business units across complex organizations</li> <li>A knack for working well with a wide range of people, both internally and externally</li> <li>Strong presentation skills, particularly for in-person meetings with multiple stakeholders</li> <li>Proven ability to lead complex negotiations involving bespoke commercial agreements</li> <li>Superior verbal and written communication skills</li> <li>Ability to operate in a highly ambiguous and fast-paced environment</li> <li>Strong interest in technology and a deep understanding of the space</li> </ul> </li> </ul>

title: AI Specialist, Treasury Finance Operations
description: <h1>AI Specialist,&nbsp;Treasury Finance Operations</h1> <h2>Who we are</h2> <h3>About Stripe</h3> <p class="mb-2 whitespace-pre-wrap">Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies — from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups — use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone’s reach while doing the most important work of your career.</p> <h3>About the team</h3> <p class="mb-2 whitespace-pre-wrap">At its core, Stripe is a treasury company, and the Treasury Finance team is central to building the Global Payments and Treasury Network (<code>GPTN</code>). Treasury Finance Operations (<code>TFin Ops</code>) plays a critical role in the strategy, execution, and support of Treasury Finance’s core functions, including cash management and forecasting, bank account management, investment execution and oversight, intercompany funding, and more.</p> <p class="mb-2 whitespace-pre-wrap">We are at an exciting inflection point and are investing heavily in AI to fundamentally transform how we operate. This role sits at the intersection of Treasury Finance expertise and applied AI and will be instrumental in building and scaling <code>TFin</code>’s AI strategy. You will work within a globally connected team to build AI-powered agents and automation solutions that make our operational workflows faster, more accurate, and more scalable.</p> <h2>What you’ll do</h2> <p class="mb-2 whitespace-pre-wrap">You will work closely with Treasury Finance subject matter experts and the broader Finance AI ecosystem to build and operationalize AI agents and automation solutions that transform how Treasury Finance teams work. You will move from understanding manual workflows to shipping effective solutions — and then enabling the team to maintain them independently.</p> <h3>In this role, you will:</h3> <ul> <li>Build and operationalize AI agents for Treasury use cases such as cash forecasting, bank account management, alerting and reporting, and workflow automation, using Stripe’s internal agentic platforms and automation tools</li> <li>Deliver solutions end-to-end, from prototype to implementation and handoff</li> <li>Automate manual and repetitive Treasury processes by identifying high-impact opportunities, designing scalable solutions, and iterating based on team feedback</li> <li>Drive&nbsp;<code>TFin AI</code>&nbsp;strategy by maintaining a prioritized backlog of automation opportunities, tracking impact, and contributing to the team’s long-term AI roadmap in partnership with Finance AI Solution Architecture and domain leads</li> <li>Design and maintain knowledge layers and data pipelines that improve agent accuracy, including structured reference data, validation frameworks, and data quality controls</li> <li>Independently scope automation opportunities, navigate platform constraints through creative problem-solving, and balance speed with quality to deliver impact quickly</li> <li>Explore and prototype emerging AI applications to address evolving Treasury challenges</li> </ul> <h2>Who you are</h2> <p class="mb-2 whitespace-pre-wrap">We’re looking for a technical problem-solver with treasury and finance expertise who is excited about using artificial intelligence to improve operational workflows. If you meet the minimum requirements below, we encourage you to apply. Preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement.</p> <h2>Minimum requirements</h2> <ul> <li>Bachelor’s degree in finance, mathematics, computer science, engineering, or a related field, with 3+ years of experience in software development, data science, or treasury and finance roles</li> <li>Experience with emerging AI and&nbsp;<code>LLM</code>&nbsp;tools, conversational interfaces, prompt engineering, automation platforms or&nbsp;<code>RPA</code>, and&nbsp;<code>LLM</code>&nbsp;frameworks such as&nbsp;<code>LangChain</code>,&nbsp;<code>LangGraph</code>, or similar tools used to build AI applications and agentic systems</li> <li>Solid understanding of AI fundamentals, including deep learning, natural language processing, and generative AI</li> <li>Familiarity with modern data tools such as&nbsp;<code>Python</code>,&nbsp;<code>Databricks</code>,&nbsp;<code>ETL/ELT</code>&nbsp;processes, and data pipelines, along with experience coding with AI assistance</li> <li>Strong proficiency in&nbsp;<code>SQL</code>, including writing complex queries and using&nbsp;<code>CTEs</code>, window functions, and joins for data analysis and pipeline logic</li> <li>Track record of independently scoping and delivering technical solutions for process improvement, with strong ownership and self-sufficiency</li> <li>Strong analytical and investigative skills, with the ability to identify root causes of data issues, debug complex problems, and resolve inconsistencies</li> </ul> <h2>Preferred qualifications</h2> <ul> <li>Familiarity with the payments industry and fintech landscape</li> <li>Experience with&nbsp;<code>Databricks</code>&nbsp;and cloud platforms such as&nbsp;<code>AWS</code>,&nbsp;<code>GCP</code>, or&nbsp;<code>Azure</code></li> <li>Software engineering experience in&nbsp;<code>Ruby</code></li> <li>Experience working in high-growth technology companies with rapidly evolving processes and tools</li> </ul>

Millions of companies—from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. Please note we may also consider you for different orgs based on your experience, location, etc. More information on our team matching process can be found </em><a href="https://docs.google.com/document/d/1zvJkO2c7GzukHG-_oqc5wbOLajpuh5FjbmZPcZPU1o0/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.ahb3b6nrktv1"><em>here</em></a><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <h2><strong>What you’ll do</strong></h2> <p>As an engineer on the team, you’ll be responsible for shaping and building a suite of products that let our users model and operate their business more efficiently. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement.</p> <h3><strong>Minimum requirements</strong></h3> <ul> <li>2-12+ years of experience in backend software development</li> <li>Ability to write high quality code (in programming languages like Go, Java, C/C++, etc.)</li> <li>Hands-on experience contributing to or building large scale distributed systems</li> <li>Strong collaboration skills, can work across workstreams within your team and contribute to your peers’ success</li> <li>Have the ability to thrive on a high level of autonomy, responsibility, and think of yourself as entrepreneurial</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Preferred Qualifications</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Familiarity with event-driven architectures</li> <li>Experience with subscription management, usage-based billing, or financial reporting systems</li> <li>Interest in financial infrastructure and how businesses manage their revenue operations</li> <li>Direct leadership and mentorship experience</li> </ul>

title: Backend Engineer, AI Security
location: New York, San Francisco, Seattle, or Remote (US/Canada)
description: <h2><strong>Who we are</strong></h2> <h3><strong>About Stripe</strong></h3> <p>Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone’s reach while doing the most important work of your career.</p> <h3><strong>About the team</strong></h3> <p>AI is moving fast and Stripe is moving fast to adopt it. But we need to make sure we do all of this safely, and for most of these tools enterprise-grade security isn't just available off the shelf. That's where the AI security team comes in - we are responsible for building and partnering to create the right security primitives to enable Stripe to move fast safely.</p> <p>This is a team that will be working in the low level components of our AI stack so both infrastructure and security experience are pluses. This space is moving fast so being comfortable with ambiguity and changes in priority are a must.</p> <p>This is a foundational role — you'd be the first engineer on the team.</p> <h2><strong>What you’ll do</strong></h2> <p>Engineers on this team will do a mixture of partnering and advising with teams building AI infrastructure and products, and building security infrastructure primitives for AI.&nbsp;</p> <p>One of our major focuses will be building a security tooling layer that sits in the inference path, providing detection and protection against AI specific threats like prompt injection, jailbreaks, and tool misuse.</p> <h3><strong>Responsibilities</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Build security frameworks integrated with our core AI infrastructure</li> <li>Design and implement defenses against AI specific threats like prompt injection and jailbreaks</li> <li>Collaborate with other engineering teams to ensure Stripe's AI infrastructure and products are built securely</li> <li>Support other engineering teams in integrating security primitives</li> <li>Uphold our high engineering standards and improve our codebase and processes</li> <li>Design and build systems that help define the state of the art for AI security</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Who you are</strong></h2> <p>We’re looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement.</p> <h3><strong>Minimum requirements</strong></h3> <ul> <li>5+ years of software development experience</li> <li>Experience independently designing and developing medium to large projects</li> <li>Experience working collaboratively across multiple engineering teams</li> <li>Experience writing high quality code in a major programming language</li> <li>Ability to drive clear next steps when working in an ambiguous environment</li> <li>Ability to think creatively and reason clearly in a complex problem domain</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Preferred qualifications</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Experience developing, deploying, and maintaining reliable infrastructure systems</li> <li>Experience in security engineering</li> <li>Experience building AI agents or LLM-based systems</li> </ul>

title: Backend Engineer/API, Payments and Risk
description: <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Note:&nbsp;if you are an intern, new grad, or staff applicant, please do not apply using this link and visit our <a href="https://stripe.com/jobs/search">jobs page</a> for those specific postings.</span></p> <h2><strong>Who we are</strong></h2> <h3><strong>About Stripe</strong></h3> <p>Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies - from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups - use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone's reach while doing the most important work of your career.</p> <h3><strong>About the Organization&nbsp;</strong></h3> <p>The Payments organization focuses on developing products and platforms that enable users to accept payments from customers efficiently. This includes building APIs for processing payments, enabling regional, non-card payment options, and extending Stripe's capabilities to make it easy for businesses to accept in-person payments. The Risk Engineering team develops products that minimize financial and regulatory risks while ensuring a seamless user experience, thereby safeguarding Stripe’s brand and financial stability.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Team Matching:</strong> exact team matching for one of the subteams within this org will begin during final stages.<em> Please note we may also consider you for different orgs based on your experience, location, etc. </em>More information on our team matching process can be found<a href="https://docs.google.com/document/d/15zZJetyRWG5DAk96sawRjLDI_cpN1QoeLMn4aAPCrYs/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.1jkobrruckv7"> here</a>. &nbsp;</p> <h2><strong>What you’ll do</strong></h2> <p>We’re looking for Backend engineers who want to make an impact on managing money at a global scale with a passion for building ergonomic APIs. You’ll play a key role in extending our balance management platform and in building out a new funds accessibility platform leveraged by enterprises and SMBs alike. Our team collaborates with many cross-functional teams – from Infrastructure to Product –&nbsp; at Stripe to deliver innovative solutions that address evolving user needs.</p> <h3><strong>Responsibilities</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Scope, design, build, and maintain APIs, services, and large-scale systems that reliably and efficiently handle billions of money movement requests</li> <li>Debug and solve critical production issues across services and multiple levels of the stack</li> <li>Mentor engineers to help them grow</li> <li>Collaborate with stakeholders across the company to build new features at large-scale, while improving internal engineering standards, tooling, and processes</li> <li>Collaborate effectively in a distributed and hybrid team, maintaining open communication and strong connections with colleagues</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Who you are</strong></h2> <p>We're looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. title: Backend Engineer, Data
description: <h2>Who we are</h2> <h3>About Stripe</h3> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone’s reach while doing the most important work of your career.</span></p> <h3>About the team</h3> <p>The Data Foundations team drives Data Engineering and Data Apps &amp; Tooling work across Stripe, enabling Stripes to leverage data to make informed decisions and build user-centric products. We provide tools and infrastructure to move, store, process, and analyze data, both at rest and in motion. We are looking for talented data-minded software engineers to help us manage business-critical data leveraged across the entire organization. If you are passionate about data, excited about designing data pipelines and data-driven user experiences, and motivated by having an outsized impact on the business, we want to hear from you.</p> <p><strong>Team Matching:</strong> exact team matching for one of the subteams will begin during final stages.<em> Please note we may also consider you for different orgs based on your experience, location, etc. </em>More information on our team matching process can be found <a href="https://docs.google.com/document/d/1zvJkO2c7GzukHG-_oqc5wbOLajpuh5FjbmZPcZPU1o0/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.ahb3b6nrktv1">here</a>.</p> <h2>What you’ll do</h2> <p>Every record in our data warehouse is vitally important for the businesses that use Stripe, so we’re looking for people with a strong background in software engineering and data to help us scale while maintaining correct and complete data. You’ll be working with a variety of internal teams across Product, Data Science, and GTM to help them solve their data needs. Your work will provide visibility into how these stakeholders and the Data Foundations organization are performing and how we can deliver a better experience to Stripe's customers.</p> <h3>Responsibilities</h3> <ul> <li>Design, develop, and own data pipelines, models, and products that power the Product, Data Science, and GTM functions</li> <li>Develop strong subject matter expertise and manage the SLAs for both data pipelines and full stack web applications that support these critical stakeholders</li> <li>Build and refine Stripe's data foundations - infrastructure, pipelines, and tools to enable various teams at Stripe - working with Scala, Spark, and Airflow</li> <li>Leverage LLM and Agents at scale to produce high-quality data on ambiguous problems</li> <li>Refine our existing data marts that help the GTM organization forecast the future potential performance of the business and reliably measure ongoing attainment toward targets</li> <li>Build data services that track key product metrics and measure the impact of different strategies employed by teams in the field</li> <li>Our tech stack is Spark, Scala, Java, SQL, and Python - and while we don’t expect everyone on the team to be an expert in all of these, you will work across all of these technologies throughout your tenure on the team</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Who you are</strong></h2> <p>We’re looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement.</p> <h3>Minimum requirements</h3> <ul> <li><strong>Must have 6+ years of experience</strong> in a Software Engineering role, with a focus on building and maintaining data services, or data-intensive applications.&nbsp;</li> <li>A strong engineering background and are interested in data</li> <li>Prior experience with writing and debugging data pipelines using a distributed data framework (Spark / Hadoop / Pig etc)</li> <li>An inquisitive nature in diving into data inconsistencies to pinpoint issues, and resolve deep rooted data quality issues</li> <li>Knowledge of a backend development language (such as Scala, Java, or Go) and strong SQL experience</li> <li>The ability to communicate cross-functionally, derive requirements and architect shared datasets</li> <li>A strong engineering background and an interest in data</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Preferred requirements</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Experience creating and maintaining Data Marts to power business reporting needs</li> <li>Experience working with Product or GTM (Sales/Marketing) teams</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p>

title: Backend Engineer, Expansion
description: <p><span style="font-size: 18pt;"><strong>Who we are</strong></span></p> <h3><strong>About Stripe</strong></h3> <p>Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone’s reach while doing the most important work of your career.</p> <h3><strong>About the team</strong></h3> <p>Web Presence and Platform is organized into two pillars, each of which is grouped into pods that focus on the central tenets of Stripe's public mission. The Presence pillar creates industry-leading designs for Stripe’s front door surfaces, educating customers about the power of our platform, sharing Stripe’s ideas and expertise with the public, and driving adoption. The Platform pillar builds the internal machinery that powers these surfaces, and is responsible for making our websites fast, stable, and easy to update.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Together we design and build stripe.com and other sites that amount to what is, for many, their first impression of Stripe. As such, WPP offers exciting opportunities to have a major impact on Stripe’s success. We want to make every pixel count, we want it to be enthralling, and we want to help other Stripes seamlessly benefit from our systematic work.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>While the team's mission anchors to web surfaces, this role lives deeper in the stack. You will be the engine behind the experiences rather than the pixel-level presentation — APIs, data pipelines, model orchestration, and service reliability that make LLM-driven user experiences possible at scale.</p> <h2><strong>What you’ll do</strong></h2> <p>The Expansion pod brings creativity and executional rigor to attracting new prospects and driving conversion, focusing on user journeys, interactive and highly polished tools for users, and building targeted experiences for our global users.</p> <p>As a backend engineer you will architect and build the server-side systems and LLM orchestration layers that power intelligent, dynamic user experiences across acquisition journeys. You will design the APIs, data pipelines, and inference infrastructure behind delightful and original interactive tools and resources that attract users. You will collaborate deeply across design, engineering, and cross-functional teams and work across teams and tech stacks to create new site capabilities — with a specific focus on integrating large language models into production-grade services that are reliable, performant, and safe.</p> <p>This is not a research or ML training role. You will be responsible for wiring LLMs into real user-facing products: managing prompt pipelines, handling model routing and fallback logic, implementing guardrails and output validation.</p> <h3><strong>Responsibilities</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Develop and implement the tooling and platforms to support interactive content tools (e.g., calculators, generators, templates) that provide utility to current and prospective businesses.</li> <li>Utilize a user-first mindset to implement feedback mechanisms for continuous improvement of content and product offerings.</li> <li>Design and build integrations to third-party software and create seamless workflows across these tools to unleash their full potential to the rest of Stripe.</li> <li>Ensure reliability, security, and responsible AI practices across all LLM-driven features, including implementing content filtering, PII handling, rate limiting, graceful degradation, and output guardrails.</li> <li>Work with a small team of technically sophisticated engineers who put users first.</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Who you are</strong></h2> <p>We’re looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement.</p> <h3><strong>Minimum requirements</strong></h3> <ul> <li>5+ years of backend development experience, with emphasis on building APIs and services that power user-facing experiences</li> <li>Experience writing clear, elegant code in a team environment</li> <li>Familiarity with LLM APIs and concepts — prompt engineering, token management, embedding models, retrieval-augmented generation, or function calling. You don't need to be a researcher, but you should understand how these models work well enough to build production systems around them.</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Experience building and operating distributed backend systems — you're comfortable with service-oriented architectures, async processing, caching layers, and monitoring/alerting in production.</li> <li>Passion for engineering solutions focused around growth hacking &amp; enablement&nbsp;</li> <li>Excellent verbal and written communication</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Preferred qualifications</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Proven ability to stitch different services and processes together even if you have not worked with them before</li> <li>Experience in developing interactive tools and integrating them with existing systems.</li> <li>Experience building highly complex interactive tools, including state management and data fetching</li> <li>Experience with data pipeline orchestration (Airflow, Dagster, Temporal, or similar) and structured output parsing from LLMs</li> <li>Experience with prompt versioning, A/B testing model outputs, or building model gateway/routing layers that allow teams to swap or compare providers (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic, open-source models)</li> <li>Proficiency with React, with a focus on interactions, animation, performance, and polish</li> <li>Experience with A/B testing, synthetic monitoring, or accessibility testing</li> </ul>

title: Backend Engineer, Forward Deployed Engineering
description: <h2>Who we are</h2> <h3>About Stripe</h3> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone’s reach while doing the most important work of your career.</span></p> <h3>About the team</h3> <p>The Forward Deployed Engineering (FDE) team exists to solve the hardest problems our most complex enterprise users face, and to turn those solutions into platform capabilities that scale to everyone. We work across Revenue Suite, Payments, and adjacent products. This is not a support function. It is an engineering team that sits at the boundary between Stripe's platform and the real-world complexity of how large enterprises actually use it.</p> <p>The traditional FDE playbook, one engineer per user who manually rebuilds context every rotation, is how every infrastructure company has done it for a decade. It does not scale. We are building something different: an agent-augmented model where AI handles the context-heavy, structured work (integration mapping, state reconciliation, infrastructure shadow testing, diagnostics) and human FDEs focus on the parts that require engineering judgment, product thinking, and direct user relationships. The goal is to build engineering muscle that lets us serve every strategic user through the platform, not just the handful we can staff individually.</p> <p>We've proven the approach with some of the world's most demanding enterprise users, delivering measurable auth rate improvements, unblocking critical platform migrations, closing multi-product integration gaps, and driving real revenue. Now we're scaling the model. If you want to solve hard user problems, build reusable platform solutions, and help shape how forward deployed engineering works as a discipline, this is the team.&nbsp;</p> <h2>What you’ll do</h2> <p>As an Engineer on the RFA Forward Deployed Engineering team, you will:</p> <ul> <li><strong>Work alongside AI agents to serve users at scale.</strong> This is central to how our team operates. AI agents maintain real-time integration maps, run shadow tests against user setups, and perform automated state reconciliation between Stripe and user systems. Your job is the work that requires an engineer: making judgment calls on ambiguous problems, building relationships with user engineering teams, making product decisions, and designing solutions. You will also help shape the tooling itself, identifying what should be automated and what needs to stay human.</li> <li><strong>Engage directly with users.</strong> You will work with Stripe's most strategic enterprise users to understand their revenue, billing, and payments requirements. You translate what you learn into technical solutions, and you bring that user reality back to product teams. This is a genuinely user-facing role, not user-facing in the "I read a dashboard" sense.</li> <li><strong>Build across product boundaries.</strong> You will design and deploy products and solutions that address product-market fit gaps, not just in Billing but across multi-product boundaries (Payments + Invoicing + Global LPMs). You embed within Stripe product engineering teams to co-develop the highest-leverage capabilities.</li> <li><strong>Build reusable solutions, not one-off fixes.</strong> Contribute to a customization framework for RFA and adjacent products: tailored billing logic, financial workflows, integrations (custom metering, product catalog integrations, checkout flows). Build patterns and blueprints that scale beyond the individual engagement.</li> <li><strong>Provide architectural guidance.</strong> Review user architectures, advise on best practices, and optimize integration and performance for complex enterprise environments. Contribute to a growing library of architectural patterns for the field.</li> <li><strong>Resolve critical technical challenges.</strong> Diagnose and fix complex product/engineering problems across the stack. Identify systemic improvements that prevent recurrence and improve platform stability.</li> <li><strong>Inform the product roadmap.</strong> The integration gaps, migration friction, and multi-product failures you surface directly shape Stripe's product strategy. You advocate for what users actually need based on what you've seen firsthand.</li> <li><strong>Raise the bar on engineering.</strong> Improve engineering standards, tooling, and processes within the team. Help build for sustainability as the team grows.</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Who you are</strong></h2> <p>You're a strong engineer who also thinks like a product person. You're comfortable with ambiguity, you'd rather talk to a user than read a spec, and you care about whether the thing you built actually solved the problem. Think: early engineer at a startup who played PM, did product discovery, partnered with users, and shipped. You're also interested in working at the frontier of agent-augmented engineering, not just using AI tools but helping define how an engineering function operates alongside them.</p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">We’re looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement.</span></p> <h3>Minimum requirements</h3> <ul> <li>5+ years of experience in software engineering, with a strong focus on backend systems.</li> <li>Proven ability to design, build, and maintain highly available, scalable, and secure systems.</li> <li>Strong command of distributed systems, API design, and data modeling.</li> <li>Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to quickly grasp complex technical and business domains.</li> <li>Clear communicator, both written and verbal, with technical and non-technical stakeholders including external users.</li> <li>Track record of working well in collaborative environments with product managers, TPMs, and other engineers.</li> <li>Willingness to engage directly with users to understand requirements and co-develop solutions. This is a core part of the role.</li> <li>Willingness to travel (~20-30%) to Stripe sites (Toronto, SF, Seattle) and user locations.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Preferred qualifications</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Experience with financial automation or billing products (e.g., Stripe Billing, Tax, Revenue Recognition, or similar).</li> <li>Experience with multi-product integration: stitching together payments, invoicing, billing, and related systems.</li> <li>Familiarity with extensibility models, custom solution frameworks, or platform development.</li> <li>Experience working with large enterprise users or in a customer-facing engineering role.</li> <li>Prior experience in a fast-paced, ambiguous environment where priorities shift based on user needs.</li> <li>Interest in or experience with AI-augmented engineering: working with AI agents, LLM-powered tooling, or building workflows where humans and AI collaborate.</li> </ul>

title: Backend Engineer, Payments and Risk
description: <p><strong><em>Note:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>if you are an intern, new grad, staff, frontend or fullstack applicant, please do not apply using this link and visit our </em><a href="https://stripe.com/jobs/search"><em>jobs page</em></a><em> for those specific postings.</em></p> <h2><strong>Who we are</strong></h2> <h3><strong>About Stripe</strong></h3> <p>Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies - from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups - use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone's reach while doing the most important work of your career.</p> <h3><strong>About the Organization&nbsp;</strong></h3> <p><strong>Payments and Risk </strong><em>Sub-orgs within Payments and Risk: Link and OCS, Payments Acceptance, Risk</em></p> <p>The Payments organization focuses on developing products and platforms that enable users to accept payments from customers efficiently. This includes building APIs for processing payments, enabling regional, non-card payment options, and extending Stripe's capabilities to make it easy for businesses to accept in-person payments. Optimized Checkout and Link teams work to create best-in-class checkout experiences that enhance customer satisfaction and drive merchant conversion rates. The Risk Engineering team develops products that minimize financial and regulatory risks while ensuring a seamless user experience, thereby safeguarding Stripe’s brand and financial stability.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Team Matching:</strong> exact team matching for one of the subteams will begin during final stages.<em> Please note we may also consider you for different orgs based on your experience, location, etc. </em>More information on our team matching process can be found <a href="https://docs.google.com/document/d/1zvJkO2c7GzukHG-_oqc5wbOLajpuh5FjbmZPcZPU1o0/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.ahb3b6nrktv1">here</a>.&nbsp;</p> <h2><strong>What you’ll do</strong></h2> <p>We’re looking for Backend engineers who want to make an impact on managing money at a global scale with a passion for building ergonomic APIs. You’ll play a key role in extending our balance management platform and in building out a new funds accessibility platform leveraged by enterprises and SMBs alike. Our team collaborates with many cross-functional teams – from Infrastructure to Product –&nbsp; at Stripe to deliver innovative solutions that address evolving user needs.</p> <h3><strong>Responsibilities</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Scope, design, build, and maintain APIs, services, and large-scale systems that reliably and efficiently handle billions of money movement requests</li> <li>Debug and solve critical production issues across services and multiple levels of the stack</li> <li>Mentor engineers to help them grow</li> <li>Collaborate with stakeholders across the company to build new features at large-scale, while improving internal engineering standards, tooling, and processes</li> <li>Collaborate effectively in a distributed and hybrid team, maintaining open communication and strong connections with colleagues</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Who you are</strong></h2> <p>We're looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement.</p> <h3><strong>Minimum requirements</strong></h3> <ul> <li>2-12+ years of industry software engineering experience (does not include internships nor includes co-ops)</li> <li>Strong coding skills in any programming language <em>(we understand new languages can be learned on the job so our interview process is language agnostic)</em></li> <li>Strong collaboration skills, can work across workstreams within your team and contribute to your peers’ success</li> <li>Have the ability to thrive on a high level of autonomy, responsibility, and think of yourself as entrepreneurial</li> <li>Interest in working as a generalist across varying technologies and stacks to solve problems and delight both internal and external users</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Preferred Qualifications</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Experience with large-scale financial tracking systems</li> <li>Good understanding and practical knowledge in cloud based services (e.g. gRPC, GraphQL, Docker/Kubernetes, cloud services such as AWS, etc.)&nbsp;</li> </ul>

title: Backend Engineer, Payments Experiences
description: <h2>Who we are</h2> <h3>About Stripe</h3> <p>Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone’s reach while doing the most important work of your career.</p> <h3>About the team</h3> <p>The Global Payments Experiences group is an organization focused on bringing new and novel payment methods to Stripe, and ensuring Stripe’s systems work well for merchants globally. This team works with internal and external partners to expand regional, non-card payment options, and to expand the use of Stripe’s payments processing globally.</p> <h2>What you’ll do</h2> <p>This is a Sao Paulo-based team, with platform teams in the US and Europe and sister teams worldwide. This team in particular will build and maintain new payment methods for Stripe, with a focus on LATAM and North America. They will manage local market idiosyncrasies, become regional experts that other Stripe teams will rely on, and partner with many non-tech functions at Stripe to expand our global reach and product portfolio.&nbsp;</p> <h3>Responsibilities</h3> <ul> <li>Design and reason about integration experiences with a strong focus on end-user simplicity and developer experience</li> <li>Build back-end services and integrations across solutions across Stripe’s payments product</li> <li>Engage and interact with external partners to determine and build technical solutions</li> <li>Engage directly with users to understand their business needs and translate requirements into concrete solutions</li> <li>Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, partnerships, eng platforms, and other engineering teams to deliver these solutions</li> <li>Contribute to software platforms used across payments at Stripe</li> </ul> <h2>Who you are</h2> <p>We’re looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement.</p> <h3>Minimum requirements</h3> <ul> <li>3+ years of backend engineering experience</li> <li>Strong command of verbal and written English language</li> <li>Experience working across geographies</li> <li>Experience building extensible, leveraged software solutions that scale to different kinds of user needs, with the ability to empathize with users and advocate for exceptional user experiences</li> </ul> <h3>Preferred qualifications</h3> <ul> <li>Previous experiences working in payments and on payments technology</li> <li>Previous experience using Stripe products</li> </ul>

title: Backend Engineer, Privy
description: <h2><strong>Who we are</strong></h2> <h3><strong>About Privy</strong></h3> <p>Our mission is to make privacy and user ownership the default online. We build simple, flexible developer tooling that make it easy to build products that put users first. By leveraging modern cryptography, we shift the status quo around digital ownership and protect the accounts and assets of millions of users.</p> <p>Learn more about Privy: <a href="https://privy.io/blog/announcing-our-acquisition-by-stripe">Privy and Stripe: Bringing crypto to everyone</a></p> <h2><strong>What you’ll do</strong></h2> <p>Engineering at Privy is not just about writing world-class code. We create software that turns complex technical systems into delightful developer tools. We assemble tried-and-true primitives into intuitive, responsive APIs and beautiful interfaces. We believe in open-source work and transparency with our teammates and users. We encourage each other to think big, run experiments and follow our curiosity so we can build better tooling that lets developers shine and empower their users.</p> <h2><strong>Who you are</strong></h2> <h3><strong>Minimum requirements</strong></h3> <ul> <li>8+ years of experience building and maintaining a production system at scale</li> <li>An understanding of modern API development best practices and design</li> <li>Experience in building data models, managing database migrations and best practices, and infrastructure configuration</li> <li>An ability to thrive in a fast paced environment.</li> <li>A growth mindset and a constant curiosity and fearlessness to dive into the unknown.</li> <li>An ability to write maintainable, well-tested, modular code, but also be pragmatic about moving fast.</li> <li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills, including the ability to write clear technical documentation.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Preferred qualifications</strong></h3> <ul> <li data-section-id="1py7yxh" data-start="0" data-end="98">Experience in an API-driven business within payments, fintech, or crypto</li> <li data-section-id="yw0o31" data-start="99" data-end="156">Built or contributed to open-source developer tooling</li> <li data-section-id="1525ovc" data-start="157" data-end="219">Published work (open source code, talks, blog posts, etc.)</li> <li data-section-id="1cohi54" data-start="220" data-end="318">Experience working with blockchain protocols and designing or interacting with smart contracts</li> <li data-section-id="e5vcfw" data-start="319" data-end="372" data-is-last-node="">Experience in authentication, identity, or security</li> </ul>

title: Product Manager of AI Applications, Global Public Sector
description: <p>Scale is growing rapidly, and joining the Global Public Sector team is an opportunity to work on one of the most exciting and quickly expanding teams at Scale. This team is responsible for generating, executing, and fostering Scale’s work with governments and government-backed entities outside of the United States.&nbsp;</p> <p>We develop bespoke solutions that leverage our customers’ proprietary data and expertise to transform their organizations with AI. We work with them to understand their pain points and workflows and then forward deploy our team to build cutting-edge solutions. The applications we build are powered by the Scale GenAI Platform, a full stack product to build, test and deploy frontier AI agents.</p> <ul> <li>Developing custom AI applications</li> <li>Building custom LLMs</li> <li>Providing high-quality training data for research and government institutions building LLMs</li> <li>Developing partnerships to foster regional talent growth and AI adoption</li> </ul> <p>We are looking for an entrepreneurial and experienced product leader to play a pivotal role in the ideation and development of transformative AI solutions. The ideal candidate has deep experience with AI/ML application development, can think strategically about how to solve a problem, is an excellent listener, is comfortable getting into the weeds operationally, and has a strong understanding of software engineering principles and practices. You will be responsible for owning large AI projects for one or many customers.</p> <p>You will lead a cross-functional team of engineers, MLEs, and operators to build a highly impactful solution for our customers that will drive millions in revenue for our business as well.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Responsibilities:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Lead design workshops with the client to define custom AI solutions&nbsp;</li> <li>Scope out new AI application use cases across various government entities</li> <li>Lead cross-functional development of AI applications and custom LLMs with diverse stakeholders (Engineering + Ops + Go-to-Market)</li> <li>Consistently engage with future end-users to solicit feedback and ensure we are prioritizing effectively</li> <li>Stay up to date with latest research in applied AI and training custom LLMs</li> <li>Scope out model evaluation sets and performance requirements, consistently review results, and iterate on the solution</li> <li>Give regular progress updates to the client and Global Public Sector leadership</li> </ul> <p><strong>Minimum Qualifications:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>4+ years of experience building products with specific experience within the last 1-2 years building AI-powered products</li> <li>Strong technical background (STEM degree) and/or experience building technical software products&nbsp;</li> <li>Strong understanding of generative AI technologies and their applications in both enterprise and consumer settings</li> <li>Experience with vibe coding tools (i.e., Replit, Lovable, Bolt, etc.) and design tools (i.e., Figma/Canva/Miro)</li> <li>Exceptional leadership, presentation and communication skills with the ability to influence cross-functional teams</li> </ul> <p><strong>Nice to haves:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Coding experience (Python)</li> <li>Proficiency in Arabic, both written and spoken</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, </em><em>Ernst</em><em> </em><em>&amp;</em><em> Young, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. Please see the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights poster</em></a><em> for additional information.</em></p> <p><em>We comply with the United States Department of Labor's </em><em>Pay Transparency provision</em><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>We collect, retain and use personal data for our professional business purposes, including notifying you of job opportunities that may be of interest and sharing with our affiliates. We limit the personal data we collect to that which we believe is appropriate and necessary to manage applicants’ needs, provide our services, and comply with applicable laws. Any information we collect in connection with your application will be treated in accordance with our internal policies and programs designed to protect personal data. Please see our <a href="https://scale.com/legal/privacy" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> for additional information.</em></p></div>

title: Engineering Manager, Developer Productivity AI
description: <h2>Who we are</h2> <h3>About Stripe</h3> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone’s reach while doing the most important work of your career.</span></p> <h3>About the team</h3> <p>We are a brand new team, working quickly to accelerate Stripes engineering productivity by effectively deploying LLM agents and tools to automate large swaths of the engineering workflow.&nbsp; We’re a cross-continent team, spanning North America and Europe, filled with high agency engineers with strong product perspectives.&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> <h2>What you’ll do</h2> <p>We are looking for a hands-on Manager who can effectively lead and guide a team high agency engineers to move quickly on a rapidly growing tech space. They will help set the product direction in a field with a nearly endless possible solution space. Folks passionate about great products, user experience and with a strong opinion about how engineers do good work will excel in this role. Prior experience with deploying AI developer tools isn’t necessary, but is interesting.&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> <p>You will:</p> <ul> <li>Lead a senior, cross-continent team of engineers to move rapidly to deploy and exploit the latest in AI devtools.</li> <li>Deliver compelling user and product experiences for internal users.</li> <li>Work across the company to redefine how software engineers at Stripe work.&nbsp;</li> <li>Keep up with an incredibly fast paced technology environment.&nbsp;</li> <li>Dig deep into the data on how engineers use AI tools to seek out every bit of benefit, and help Stripe accelerate.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Who you are</strong></h2> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">We’re looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement.</span></p> <h3>Minimum requirements</h3> <ul> <li>2+ years managing high performing engineering teams, and at least 5+ years of experience as a software engineer.&nbsp;</li> <li>Proven success in recruiting and building great teams.</li> <li>A repeated history of delivering great, innovative product experiences - either for internal or external users.&nbsp;</li> <li>Effective cross-functional collaboration, with the ability to think rigorously, communicate clearly, and make or coordinate difficult decisions and trade-offs.</li> <li>Thrives with high autonomy and responsibility in an ambiguous environment.</li> <li>Ability to foster a healthy, inclusive, challenging, and supportive work environment.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Preferred qualifications</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Experience Tech leading, mentoring and managing a team that shipped products to engineers.</li> <li>Experience building tools and products, ideally for technical audiences - either as internal or external customers.&nbsp;</li> <li>Deep curiosity and opinionation about the use of AI in software engineering.&nbsp;</li> <li>Strong written and verbal communication skills for various audiences, including leadership, users, and company-wide.</li> </ul>

title: Senior / Staff Machine Learning Research Scientist, Agents
location: San Francisco, CA; Seattle, WA; New York, NY
description: <p><strong>About Scale</strong></p> <p>At Scale AI, our mission is to accelerate the development of AI applications. For 8 years, Scale has been the leading AI data foundry, helping fuel the most exciting advancements in AI, including: generative AI, defense applications, and autonomous vehicles. With our recent Series F round, we’re accelerating the abundance of frontier data to pave the road to Artificial General Intelligence (AGI), and building upon our prior model evaluation work with enterprise customers and governments, to deepen our capabilities and offerings for both public and private evaluations.</p> <p><strong>About the ACE team&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>The Agent Capabilities &amp; Environments (ACE) team, part of Scale’s Research organization, brings together customer-facing Researchers and Applied AI Engineers. Our core mission includes research on agent environments and RL reward signals, benchmarking autonomous agent performance across real-world scenarios and environments, creating robust data programs to improve Large Language Models (LLMs) agentic capabilities and building foundational tools and frameworks for evaluating models as agents. ACE focuses on autonomous agents that dynamically interact with diverse external environments, including code repositories, GUI interfaces, browsers, and more.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>About This Role</strong></p> <p>This role is at the intersection of cutting-edge AI research and practical application, with a focus on studying the data types essential for building state-of-the-art agents, such as browser and SWE agents. The ideal candidate will explore the data landscape needed to advance intelligent, adaptable AI agents, guiding the data strategy at Scale to drive innovation. This position requires not only expertise in LLM agents and planning algorithms but also creativity in addressing novel challenges related to data, interaction, and evaluation. You will contribute to impactful research publications on agents, collaborate with customer researchers, and work alongside the engineering team to translate these advancements into real-world, scalable solutions.</p> <h3><strong>Ideally you’d have:&nbsp;</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Practical experience working with LLMs, with proficiency in frameworks like Pytorch, Jax, or Tensorflow. You should also be adept at interpreting research literature and quickly turning new ideas into prototypes.</li> <li>A track record of published research in top ML venues (e.g., ACL, EMNLP, NAACL, NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR, COLM, etc.)</li> <li>At least three years of experience addressing sophisticated ML problems, either in a research setting or product development.</li> <li>Strong written and verbal communication skills and the ability to operate cross-functionally.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Nice to have:</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Hands-on experience with open source LLM fine-tuning or involvement in bespoke LLM fine-tuning projects using Pytorch/Jax.&nbsp;</li> <li>Hands-on experience and publications in building applications and evaluations related to AI agents such as tool-use, text2SQL, browser agents, coding agents and GUI agents.</li> <li>Hands-on experience with agent frameworks such as OpenHands, Swarm, LangGraph, etc.</li> <li>Familiarity with agentic reasoning methods such as STaR and PLANSEARCH&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience working with cloud technology stack (eg. AWS or GCP) and developing machine learning models in a cloud environment.</li> </ul> <p>Our research interviews are crafted to assess candidates' skills in practical ML prototyping and debugging, their grasp of research concepts, and their alignment with our organizational culture. We will not ask any LeetCode-style questions.</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position and may be inclusive of several career levels at Scale; it will be determined during the interview process based on work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, qualifications, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You'll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">Please reference the job posting's subtitle for where this position will be located. For pay transparency purposes, the base salary range for this full-time position in the locations of San Francisco, New York, Seattle is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$302,400</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$378,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, </em><em>Ernst</em><em> </em><em>&amp;</em><em> Young, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. Please see the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights poster</em></a><em> for additional information.</em></p> <p><em>We comply with the United States Department of Labor's </em><em>Pay Transparency provision</em><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>We collect, retain and use personal data for our professional business purposes, including notifying you of job opportunities that may be of interest and sharing with our affiliates. Please see our <a href="https://scale.com/legal/privacy" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> for additional information.</em></p></div>

title: SWE Fellow - Human Frontier Collective (UK)
description: <p>PLEASE NOTE: This is a fully remote, 1099 independent contractor opportunity with an estimated duration of six months and the potential for extension. To be eligible, candidates must be authorized to work in the country they reside in.</p> <h3><strong>About the Program</strong></h3> <p>The<strong> Human Frontier Collective (HFC) Fellowship</strong> brings together top researchers and domain experts to collaborate on high-impact work that are shaping the future of AI. As an HFC Fellow, you’ll apply your academic and professional expertise to help design, evaluate, and interpret advanced generative AI systems—while gaining exposure to cutting-edge research and working alongside an interdisciplinary network of leading thinkers.</p> <h3><strong>What You'll Do</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Collaborative Work: </strong>Get invited to engage in high-impact projects with our partnered AI labs and platforms. Design complex, domain-specific problems and datasets to rigorously evaluate AI models, and provide expert insights that enhance their accuracy, reasoning, and overall performance.&nbsp;</li> <li><strong>HFC Community:</strong> Beyond the work, you’ll become part of a supportive, interdisciplinary network of innovators and thought leaders committed to advancing frontier AI across domains.</li> <li><strong>Contribute to Research Publications:</strong> Collaborate with Scale’s research team to co-author technical reports and research papers—boosting your academic visibility and professional recognition&nbsp;(e.g., <a href="https://scale.com/research/scipredict"><em>SciPredict</em></a>, <a href="https://scale.com/research/propensitybench"><em>PropensityBench</em></a>, <a href="https://scale.com/research/prbench"><em>Professional Reasoning Benchmark</em></a>).</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Who Should Apply</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Professional and Academic Background:</strong> 5+ years of software engineering or related technical experience, or equivalent domain expertise through academic work (e.g. PhD, postdoctoral research, or faculty experience in Computer Science or related field).</li> <li><strong>Skills: </strong>Demonstrated coding proficiency and analytical abilities, with deep expertise in one or more of the following programming languages: Python, Java, Rust, Swift, JavaScript, or C++.</li> <li><strong>Professional Mindset:</strong> Detail-oriented, innovative thinker with a passion in applied AI research and a commitment to collaboration.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Why Join the HFC?</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Professional Development: </strong>High-impact experts expand their influence through review projects, advisory roles, and research—while deepening their AI expertise, strengthening analytical and problem-solving skills, and engaging with pioneering AI applications in science and technology.</li> title: Global Partner Marketing Lead, AI
description: <h2><strong>Who we are </strong></h2> <h3><strong>About Stripe</strong></h3> <p>Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone’s reach while doing the most important work of your career.</p> <h3><strong>About the team</strong></h3> <p>The Global Partner Marketing team extends Stripe’s marketing reach to customers and prospects by educating, engaging, and enabling partners worldwide to build market awareness and generate demand for Stripe solutions and services. We market to, with, and through our partners to increase our reach, scale our impact, accelerate revenue growth, and support partners in expanding their businesses with Stripe.</p> <p>This role will work closely with the Agentic Commerce and AI GTM team, part of the newly-formed AI growth team, to cultivate and expand our relationships with leading AI companies and major technology partners, thereby driving the next wave of growth of Stripe’s suite of agentic commerce products.&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> <h2><strong>What you’ll do</strong></h2> <p>We are seeking an experienced, creative, and results-driven marketer to join our Global Partner Marketing team. Our mission is to deliver an exceptional Stripe experience for our partners by providing them with the right engagement, resources, and incentives as they build, launch, market, and scale their businesses with us. The Global AI Partner Marketing Manager will work directly with some of our most strategic AI partners to identify our shared users, develop joint marketing plans, and execute co-marketing campaigns aimed at driving customer acquisition and activation. As the inaugural hire dedicated to this partner segment, you will have the unique opportunity to shape our AI partner marketing strategy and investment model.</p> <p>At Stripe, we're looking for people with passion, grit, and integrity. You're encouraged to apply even if your experience doesn't precisely match the job description. Your skills and passion will stand out—and set you apart—especially if your career has taken some extraordinary twists and turns. At Stripe, we welcome diverse perspectives and people who think rigorously and aren't afraid to challenge assumptions.</p> <h3><strong>Responsibilities</strong></h3> <ul> <li style="font-weight: 400;">Partner closely with the AI Growth team, Product Marketing, and Product to gather inputs and align on strategies that support mutually beneficial opportunities</li> <li style="font-weight: 400;">Define annual joint marketing strategies, objectives, and success metrics for a portfolio of strategic AI partners</li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Develop aligned messaging and produce bespoke co-marketing campaigns and activations with your portfolio of partners</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Execute co-marketing initiatives (e.g. joint email campaigns, co-branded webinars, etc.) to drive new user acquisition, increase product upsell, and generate sales pipeline with and through partners</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;">Deliver account based marketing plans to support GTM strategies aligned with sales</li> <li style="font-weight: 400;">Integrate partners into Stripe-led campaigns by collaborating with cross-functional marketing teams such as Campaigns, Product Marketing, Regional Marketing, and Demand Generation</li> <li style="font-weight: 400;">Define scaling mechanisms to provide marketing resources and enablement that support a scaled partner motion</li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Manage marketing budgets with each partner to drive ROITrack and evaluate the performance of co-marketing activities, sharing insights with the team to identify the most effective strategies and recommendations&nbsp;</span></li> </ul> <h2><strong>Who you are</strong></h2> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">We're looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement.</span></p> <h3><strong>Minimum requirements</strong></h3> <ul> <li style="font-weight: 400;">5+ years of relevant B2B marketing experience that can span marketing, product marketing, or partner marketing</li> <li style="font-weight: 400;">At least 2-3 years of product marketing or go-to-market experience; experience working with payments, AI, or commerce preferred</li> <li style="font-weight: 400;">Experience working closely with go-to-market partners to build joint marketing plans and execute marketing programs and campaigns that drive mutually beneficial KPIs and new customer acquisition and pipeline generation outcomes</li> <li style="font-weight: 400;">Experience shaping joint messaging and creating content with partners</li> <li style="font-weight: 400;">Demonstrated experience in measuring and improving the ROI of marketing investments through an indirect business model leveraging partners</li> <li style="font-weight: 400;">Deep understanding of the user journey through a partner distribution channel and funnel, sales cycle and product lifecycle and their respective requirements on the partner marketing organization to drive attach and revenue &nbsp;</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Preferred qualifications</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Strong skills in building relationships with existing and new partners to align plans, drive clarity, and ensure effective communication of progress</li> <li>High agency and adaptability, thriving in a fast-paced environment with the ability to handle ambiguity and work autonomously.</li> <li>Big picture thinking and meticulous attention to detail–you’re able to quickly understand overall business objectives, build a well-aligned marketing strategy and drive yourself and your cross-functional partners towards execution.</li> <li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills with the ability to influence various stakeholders both internally and externally.</li> <li>Excellent analytical skills and the ability to craft actionable insights from complex data</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p>

title: Integrated Campaigns Manager, Startups & AI
location: San Francisco, New York, Seattle, Chicago, Remote in the US
description: <h2><strong>Who we are </strong></h2> <h3><strong>About Stripe</strong></h3> <p>Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone’s reach while doing the most important work of your career.</p> <h3><strong>About the team</strong></h3> <p>Stripe’s global demand campaigns team delivers marketing campaigns that drive awareness and engagement for our audiences, solutions, and products worldwide. Working closely with sales and marketing teams, our campaigns support Stripe’s larger business objectives and deliver impact. We build, deliver, monitor, and evolve campaign delivery across a broad suite of content, tactics, and channels. Using a broad suite of metrics, we continuously measure our work and refine our strategies to improve outreach, enhance the customer journey, and support revenue growth for the organization.</p> <h2><strong>What you’ll do</strong></h2> <p>In this role you’ll quarterback the integrated campaign strategies, plans, and playbooks focused on startups and AI companies. You’ll champion the needs of these audiences, holding deep market and audience insight and direct business accountability. You’ll lead a large, global, cross-functional workstream to build campaign strategies and content, then work with regional teams to craft local strategies and to deliver activations through integrated channels. You’ll capture performance against all of your efforts, analyze results, and share learnings to drive continuous improvement and impact. Ultimately, you’ll be accountable for acquisition, engagement, and pipeline growth.</p> <h3><strong>The ideal candidate </strong></h3> <ul> <li>Holds expert-level knowledge of the startup and AI company landscape</li> <li>Has proven expertise crafting and delivering global, audience-focused campaign strategies</li> <li>Excels in leading and driving large, complex, global campaigns or programs</li> <li>Has strong analytics skills, with the ability to interpret, analyze, and communicate campaign performance across marketing and sales KPIs</li> <li>Works with and influences across cross-functional stakeholder groups, including senior sales, marketing, and product leaders</li> <li>“Sees around corners”; anticipates and unblocks challenges, stays ahead of market/audience trends, and anticipates regional/country needs and nuance</li> <li>Understands modern storytelling and content trends, and can translate those into thoughtful, resonant campaign strategies</li> <li>Is agile, iterative, AI-fluent, and comfortable with ambiguity and high growth environments</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Responsibilities</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Own the overall campaign strategy and plan for startups and AI companies, and drive the global, cross-functional workstream for activation and impact</li> <li>Partner with comms, product marketing, channel teams, regional and field marketing, partner marketing, sales teams, and more to define and implement campaigns.</li> <li>Work with regional marketing to ensure local relevance and advise on campaign delivery</li> <li>Use your multi-channel expertise to deliver campaigns via digital, web, email, online events, direct mail, social, events, sales plays, and more, all in partnership with functional and regional teams</li> <li>Partner with product marketing and content/editorial teams to develop compelling, relevant campaign materials and content sets, including whitepapers, guides, blogs, checklists, interactive content, promotions/offers, etc.</li> <li>Use and/or recommend leading tools to improve or accelerate the work of the campaigns function</li> <li>Act as an expert for your owned audience/solution to champion market trends, competitive context, and customer insights, ultimately shaping all industry campaign strategies.</li> <li>Track, analyze, and report on campaign performance metrics with a focus on lead generation, pipeline, and target account penetration. Share learnings regularly to improve overall campaign efficacy.</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Who you are</strong></h2> <p>We’re looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement.</p> <h3><strong>Minimum requirements</strong></h3> <ul> <li>8+ years of enterprise B2B marketing experience that includes some mix of integrated campaigns, content marketing, regional/field marketing, and/or account-based marketing, with demonstrated increase in scope</li> <li>Expert-level knowledge of the startup and AI landscape</li> <li>Proven expertise in partnering with regional marketing and sales teams to build, grow, and develop pipeline</li> <li>Analytical acumen, with the ability to build, interpret, and adjust measurement tools and data</li> <li>Exceptional presentation, writing, and communication skills, especially to executive stakeholders</li> <li>Appetite and ability to work through ambiguity, evaluate and recommend solutions, and drive clarity across complex, global stakeholder groups</li> <li>Ability to build campaigns and programs from the ground, orchestrating many moving parts across disparate functions</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Preferred qualifications</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Experience at a highly dynamic, fast-growing growth tech company</li> <li>Experience in the payments, financial technology, or adjacent industries or marketing FinTech solutions&nbsp;</li> <li>Integrated campaigns experience focused on select audiences: enterprise and industries (retail, media/entertainment/gaming, financial services, insurance, travel/hospitality/leisure), SMB/mid-market, SaaS platforms, startups</li> <li>Product campaigns experience focused on payments, fraud, financial services, and/or embedded finance</li> </ul>
